docs.title: 宿舍用电管理系统 - 项目系列学习文档
docs.text: 🎓 采用任务驱动式教学法，从零开始掌握企业级 Spring Boot + Vue 全栈开发

docs.title: 📚 文档概述
docs.text: 本系列文档是宿舍用电管理系统（DormPower）的模块化学习教程，包含 **10 个核心模块**的完整开发教程。每个模块按照统一的开发流程组织，涵盖从后端设计到前端实现的完整开发过程。

docs.text:

    每个模块明确列出知识目标、能力目标、成果目标

  • :material-steps: 分步实操

    后端前端都按步骤分解，每步都有实操任务

  • 完整代码

    提供完整可运行的代码示例，代码高亮渲染

  • 文件结构

    清晰展示完成后的文件结构，便于对照检查

  • 联调验证

    提供详细的功能验证清单，确保功能正常

  • 扩展练习

    分层级的练习题目（基础/进阶/挑战）

docs.title: 模块 01：用户认证与权限管理模块
docs.text: 学习时长: 3-5 天 难度: ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ 前置知识: Java 基础、Spring Boot 入门、Vue 基础

docs.title: 知识目标
docs.text:
• ✅ 理解 Spring Security 工作原理
  • ✅ 掌握 JWT 认证机制
  • ✅ 理解 RBAC 权限模型设计
  • ✅ 掌握前后端分离认证流程

docs.title: 能力目标
docs.text:
• ✅ 能够独立设计用户认证系统
  • ✅ 能够实现 JWT Token 生成与验证
  • ✅ 能够实现基于角色的权限控制
  • ✅ 能够完成前后端认证联调

docs.title: 成果目标
docs.text: 完成本模块后，你将拥有： - 📁 完整的用户认证后端 API（登录、登出、刷新 Token） - 📁 用户管理、角色管理、权限管理功能 - 📁 前端登录页面和用户管理页面 - 📁 完善的单元测试用例 - 📁 可运行的认证授权系统

docs.title: 2.1 业务场景
docs.text:
场景 1：用户登录

用户输入用户名密码 → 系统验证 → 返回 Token → 用户后续请求携带 Token

场景 2：权限控制

用户访问资源 → 系统检查 Token → 验证权限 → 允许/拒绝访问

场景 3：角色管理

管理员创建角色 → 分配权限 → 给用户分配角色 → 用户继承角色权限

docs.title: 2.2 功能需求清单
docs.text: 功能 描述 优先级 用户登录 用户名密码认证，返回 JWT Token P0 用户登出 使 Token 失效 P0 Token 刷新 Token 过期前刷新 P0 用户管理 用户 CRUD、重置密码 P0 角色管理 角色 CRUD、分配权限 P1 权限管理 权限 CRUD、分配角色 P1 登录日志 记录登录行为 P2 IP 访问控制 IP 白名单/黑名单 P2

docs.title: 2.3 技术选型与理由
docs.text:
技术 说明 版本 选型理由 Spring Security 安全框架 3.2.x ✅ 行业标准：Spring 官方推荐的安全框架，生态完善✅ 功能全面：支持认证、授权、CSRF 防护、会话管理✅ 灵活扩展：支持自定义认证逻辑、权限表达式✅ 学习价值：企业级项目必备技能，就业市场需求大 JWT (jjwt) Token 认证 0.12.x ✅ 无状态：服务端不存储 Token，降低服务器压力✅ 跨域支持：适合前后端分离架构✅ 自包含：Token 中包含用户信息，减少数据库查询✅ 安全性：支持签名验证，防止篡改⚠️ 注意：实际项目中使用 String 作为主键而非 UUID，便于分布式 ID 生成 BCrypt 密码加密 - ✅ 加盐哈希：自动处理盐值，无需手动管理✅ 自适应：可调整加密强度（work factor）✅ 不可逆：即使数据库泄露也无法还原密码✅ Spring 集成：Spring Security 内置支持 Vue Router 路由守卫 4.x ✅ 官方路由：Vue.js 官方维护，兼容性好✅ 路由守卫：实现前端权限控制（beforeEach）✅ 动态路由：支持根据权限动态加载路由✅ TypeScript：完整的类型支持

技术对比与取舍： - Session vs JWT：选择 JWT 因为项目是前后端分离架构，且需要支持移动端 - MD5 vs BCrypt：选择 BCrypt 因为更安全，支持自适应加密强度 - Shiro vs Spring Security：选择 Spring Security 因为生态更完善，与 Spring Boot 集成更好

docs.title: 1.1 创建 UserAccount 实体
docs.text:
文件位置: backend/src/main/java/com/dormpower/model/UserAccount.java

package com.dormpower.model;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.Data;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.Set;
import java.util.UUID;

@Data
@Entity
@Table(name = "user_account")
public class UserAccount {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(unique = true, nullable = false, length = 50)
    private String username;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    private String password;

    @Column(length = 100)
    private String email;

    @Column(length = 20)
    private String phone;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    private UserStatus status = UserStatus.ACTIVE;

    private boolean accountNonExpired = true;
    private boolean accountNonLocked = true;
    private boolean credentialsNonExpired = true;
    private boolean enabled = true;

    private LocalDateTime createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    private LocalDateTime updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    private LocalDateTime lastLoginAt;

    @ManyToMany(fetch = FetchType.EAGER)
    @JoinTable(
        name = "user_role",
        joinColumns = @JoinColumn(name = "user_id"),
        inverseJoinColumns = @JoinColumn(name = "role_id")
    )
    private Set<Role> roles;
}

enum UserStatus {
    ACTIVE, INACTIVE, LOCKED
}

实操任务: - [ ] 创建 UserAccount.java 文件 - [ ] 复制上述代码 - [ ] 理解每个字段的含义 - [ ] 运行项目，检查实体类是否被 JPA 识别

docs.title: 3.2 创建 AuthServiceImpl
docs.text:
文件位置: backend/src/main/java/com/dormpower/service/impl/AuthServiceImpl.java

package com.dormpower.service.impl;

import com.dormpower.dto.request.LoginRequest;
import com.dormpower.dto.response.AuthResponse;
import com.dormpower.model.UserAccount;
import com.dormpower.repository.UserAccountRepository;
import com.dormpower.service.AuthService;
import com.dormpower.utils.JwtTokenProvider;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.security.authentication.AuthenticationManager;
import org.springframework.security.authentication.UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken;
import org.springframework.security.core.Authentication;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class AuthServiceImpl implements AuthService {

    private final AuthenticationManager authenticationManager;
    private final UserAccountRepository userAccountRepository;
    private final JwtTokenProvider jwtTokenProvider;

    @Override
    public AuthResponse login(LoginRequest request) {
        // 1. 认证
        Authentication authentication = authenticationManager.authenticate(
            new UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(
                request.getUsername(),
                request.getPassword()
            )
        );

        // 2. 生成 Token
        String accessToken = jwtTokenProvider.generateAccessToken(authentication);
        String refreshToken = jwtTokenProvider.generateRefreshToken(authentication);

        // 3. 更新最后登录时间
        UserAccount user = userAccountRepository.findByUsername(request.getUsername()).orElseThrow();
        user.setLastLoginAt(java.time.LocalDateTime.now());
        userAccountRepository.save(user);

        // 4. 返回响应
        return AuthResponse.builder()
            .accessToken(accessToken)
            .refreshToken(refreshToken)
            .userId(user.getId())
            .username(user.getUsername())
            .build();
    }

    @Override
    public void logout(String token) {
        // 将 Token 加入黑名单
        jwtTokenProvider.addToBlacklist(token);
    }

    @Override
    public AuthResponse refreshToken(String refreshToken) {
        // 验证刷新 Token
        if (!jwtTokenProvider.validateToken(refreshToken)) {
            throw new RuntimeException("Invalid refresh token");
        }

        String username = jwtTokenProvider.getUsernameFromToken(refreshToken);
        UserAccount user = userAccountRepository.findByUsername(username).orElseThrow();

        // 生成新 Token
        Authentication authentication = jwtTokenProvider.getAuthentication(refreshToken);
        String newAccessToken = jwtTokenProvider.generateAccessToken(authentication);

        return AuthResponse.builder()
            .accessToken(newAccessToken)
            .refreshToken(refreshToken)
            .userId(user.getId())
            .username(user.getUsername())
            .build();
    }

    @Override
    public UserAccount getCurrentUser() {
        // 从安全上下文获取当前用户
        String username = jwtTokenProvider.getCurrentUserUsername();
        return userAccountRepository.findByUsername(username).orElseThrow();
    }
}

实操任务: - [ ] 创建 AuthService 接口 - [ ] 创建 AuthServiceImpl 实现类 - [ ] 理解认证流程 - [ ] 理解 Token 生成逻辑

docs.title: 4.1 创建 AuthController
docs.text:
文件位置: backend/src/main/java/com/dormpower/controller/AuthController.java

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.dto.request.LoginRequest;
import com.dormpower.dto.response.AuthResponse;
import com.dormpower.service.AuthService;
import jakarta.validation.Valid;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/auth")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class AuthController {

    private final AuthService authService;

    @PostMapping("/login")
    public ResponseEntity<AuthResponse> login(@Valid @RequestBody LoginRequest request) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(authService.login(request));
    }

    @PostMapping("/logout")
    @PreAuthorize("isAuthenticated()")
    public ResponseEntity<Void> logout(@RequestHeader("Authorization") String token) {
        authService.logout(token.replace("Bearer ", ""));
        return ResponseEntity.ok().build();
    }

    @PostMapping("/refresh")
    public ResponseEntity<AuthResponse> refreshToken(@RequestHeader("Authorization") String refreshToken) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(authService.refreshToken(refreshToken.replace("Bearer ", "")));
    }

    @GetMapping("/me")
    @PreAuthorize("isAuthenticated()")
    public ResponseEntity<Object> getCurrentUser() {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(authService.getCurrentUser());
    }
}

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.dto.request.LoginRequest;
import com.dormpower.dto.response.AuthResponse;
import com.dormpower.service.AuthService;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.WebMvcTest;
import org.springframework.boot.test.mock.mockito.MockBean;
import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
import org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc;

import java.util.UUID;

import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;
import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;
import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.request.MockMvcRequestBuilders.post;
import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers.jsonPath;
import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers.status;

@WebMvcTest(AuthController.class)
class AuthControllerTest {

    @Autowired
    private MockMvc mockMvc;

    @MockBean
    private AuthService authService;

    @Autowired
    private ObjectMapper objectMapper;

    @Test
    void testLogin_Success() throws Exception {
        // 准备测试数据
        LoginRequest request = new LoginRequest("admin", "password123");
        AuthResponse response = AuthResponse.builder()
            .accessToken("test-access-token")
            .refreshToken("test-refresh-token")
            .userId(UUID.randomUUID())
            .username("admin")
            .build();

        // Mock Service 返回
        when(authService.login(any(LoginRequest.class))).thenReturn(response);

        // 执行测试
        mockMvc.perform(post("/api/auth/login")
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
                .content(objectMapper.writeValueAsString(request)))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.accessToken").value("test-access-token"))
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.username").value("admin"));
    }

    @Test
    void testLogin_InvalidCredentials() throws Exception {
        // 测试无效凭证
        LoginRequest request = new LoginRequest("admin", "wrong-password");

        when(authService.login(any(LoginRequest.class)))
            .thenThrow(new RuntimeException("Invalid credentials"));

        mockMvc.perform(post("/api/auth/login")
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
                .content(objectMapper.writeValueAsString(request)))
            .andExpect(status().is4xxClientError());
    }
}

import axios from 'axios';
import type { LoginRequest, AuthResponse, User } from '@/types/auth';

const API_BASE = '/api/auth';

export const authApi = {
  // 登录
  async login(data: LoginRequest): Promise<AuthResponse> {
    const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/login`, data);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 登出
  async logout(token: string): Promise<void> {
    await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/logout`, null, {
      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }
    });
  },

  // 刷新 Token
  async refreshToken(refreshToken: string): Promise<AuthResponse> {
    const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/refresh`, null, {
      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${refreshToken}` }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取当前用户信息
  async getCurrentUser(): Promise<User> {
    const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/me`);
    return response.data;
  }
};

import { reactive, ref } from 'vue';
import { useRouter } from 'vue-router';
import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus';
import type { FormInstance, FormRules } from 'element-plus';
import { authApi } from '@/api/auth';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/auth';

const router = useRouter();
const authStore = useAuthStore();
const formRef = ref<FormInstance>();
const loading = ref(false);

const loginForm = reactive({
  username: 'admin',
  password: 'admin123'
});

const rules: FormRules = {
  username: [
    { required: true, message: '请输入用户名', trigger: 'blur' }
  ],
  password: [
    { required: true, message: '请输入密码', trigger: 'blur' },
    { min: 6, message: '密码长度至少 6 位', trigger: 'blur' }
  ]
};

const handleLogin = async () => {
  if (!formRef.value) return;

  await formRef.value.validate(async (valid) => {
    if (!valid) return;

    loading.value = true;
    try {
      const response = await authApi.login(loginForm);

      // 保存 Token 和用户信息
      await authStore.setToken(response.accessToken);
      await authStore.setUser({
        id: response.userId,
        username: response.username,
        roles: [],
        permissions: []
      });

      ElMessage.success('登录成功');
      router.push('/');
    } catch (error: any) {
      ElMessage.error(error.response?.data?.message || '登录失败');
    } finally {
      loading.value = false;
    }
  });
};
</script>

docs.title: 步骤 4：状态管理
docs.text:
文件位置: frontend/src/stores/auth.ts

import { defineStore } from 'pinia';
import { ref, computed } from 'vue';
import type { User, AuthState } from '@/types/auth';
import { authApi } from '@/api/auth';

export const useAuthStore = defineStore('auth', () => {
  const token = ref<string | null>(localStorage.getItem('token'));
  const user = ref<User | null>(null);

  const isAuthenticated = computed(() => !!token.value);
  const roles = computed(() => user.value?.roles || []);
  const permissions = computed(() => user.value?.permissions || []);

  // 设置 Token
  async function setToken(newToken: string) {
    token.value = newToken;
    localStorage.setItem('token', newToken);
  }

  // 设置用户信息
  async function setUser(newUser: User) {
    user.value = newUser;
  }

  // 加载用户信息
  async function loadUser() {
    if (!token.value) return;

    try {
      const userData = await authApi.getCurrentUser();
      user.value = userData;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to load user:', error);
    }
  }

  // 登出
  async function logout() {
    if (token.value) {
      await authApi.logout(token.value);
    }
    token.value = null;
    user.value = null;
    localStorage.removeItem('token');
  }

  return {
    token,
    user,
    isAuthenticated,
    roles,
    permissions,
    setToken,
    setUser,
    loadUser,
    logout
  };
});

import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from 'vue-router';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/auth';

const router = createRouter({
  history: createWebHistory(),
  routes: [
    {
      path: '/login',
      name: 'Login',
      component: () => import('@/views/LoginView.vue')
    },
    {
      path: '/',
      name: 'Home',
      component: () => import('@/views/HomeView.vue'),
      meta: { requiresAuth: true }
    }
  ]
});

// 全局前置守卫
router.beforeEach(async (to, from, next) => {
  const authStore = useAuthStore();

  // 检查是否需要认证
  if (to.meta.requiresAuth && !authStore.isAuthenticated) {
    next({ name: 'Login', query: { redirect: to.fullPath } });
    return;
  }

  // 如果已认证但访问登录页
  if (to.name === 'Login' && authStore.isAuthenticated) {
    next({ name: 'Home' });
    return;
  }

  next();
});

export default router;

docs.title: 问题 1：跨域认证失败
docs.text:
现象: 前端调用后端接口报 CORS 错误

解决方案:

// 在 SecurityConfig 中配置 CORS
@Configuration
@EnableWebSecurity
public class SecurityConfig {

    @Bean
    public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {
        http
            .cors(cors -> cors.configurationSource(corsConfigurationSource()))
            // ... 其他配置
        ;
        return http.build();
    }

    @Bean
    public CorsConfigurationSource corsConfigurationSource() {
        CorsConfiguration configuration = new CorsConfiguration();
        configuration.setAllowedOrigins(List.of("http://localhost:3000"));
        configuration.setAllowedMethods(List.of("GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"));
        configuration.setAllowedHeaders(List.of("*"));
        configuration.setAllowCredentials(true);

        UrlBasedCorsConfigurationSource source = new UrlBasedCorsConfigurationSource();
        source.registerCorsConfiguration("/**", configuration);
        return source;
    }
}

docs.title: 问题 2：Token 刷新时序问题
docs.text:
现象: 多个请求同时触发 Token 刷新

解决方案:

// 在 API 拦截器中控制
let isRefreshing = false;
let refreshSubscribers: Array<(token: string) => void> = [];

axios.interceptors.response.use(
  response => response,
  async error => {
    const { config, response } = error;

    if (response?.status === 401 && !config._retry) {
      if (isRefreshing) {
        // 等待刷新完成
        return new Promise(resolve => {
          refreshSubscribers.push(token => {
            config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
            resolve(axios(config));
          });
        });
      }

      config._retry = true;
      isRefreshing = true;

      try {
        const newToken = await refreshToken();
        refreshSubscribers.forEach(cb => cb(newToken));
        return axios(config);
      } finally {
        isRefreshing = false;
        refreshSubscribers = [];
      }
    }

    return Promise.reject(error);
  }
);

docs.text:
场景 1：设备注册

新设备到货 → 录入系统 → 分配房间 → 设备上线 → 状态变为 ONLINE

场景 2：设备监控

设备定时上报数据 → MQTT Broker → MqttBridge → 更新设备状态 → WebSocket 推送前端

场景 3：设备分组

创建设备组 → 添加设备到组 → 批量操作组内设备 → 查看组统计

场景 4：固件升级

上传固件 → 选择目标设备 → 推送升级命令 → 设备下载升级 → 上报新版本

docs.title: 2.3 技术选型与理由
docs.text:
技术 说明 版本 选型理由 MQTT (Eclipse Paho) IoT 通信协议 1.3.x ✅ 轻量级：协议头最小仅 2 字节，适合低带宽环境✅ 发布/订阅：解耦设备与服务端，支持一对多通信✅ QoS 保障：支持 3 个等级（0/½）的消息可靠性保障✅ 遗嘱消息：设备异常离线时可发送遗嘱消息✅ 低功耗：适合电池供电的 IoT 设备 Spring Data JPA ORM 框架 3.2.x ✅ 开发效率：注解驱动，减少样板代码✅ 数据库无关：可轻松切换数据库✅ 级联操作：自动处理设备与关联实体关系⚠️ 注意：实际项目使用 Long/IDENTITY 而非 UUID，便于数据库自增 WebSocket 实时推送 - ✅ 双向通信：服务端可主动推送设备状态到前端✅ 低延迟：保持长连接，避免轮询开销✅ 标准协议：浏览器原生支持，无需额外插件 Lombok 代码简化 - ✅ 减少样板：自动生成 Getter/Setter/Constructor✅ 可读性：减少视觉干扰，聚焦业务逻辑✅ 维护性：减少手动生成代码的错误

技术对比与取舍： - MQTT vs HTTP：选择 MQTT 因为 IoT 设备需要长连接、低功耗、实时推送 - JPA vs MyBatis：选择 JPA 因为设备管理 CRUD 操作多，JPA 开发效率更高 - WebSocket vs SSE：选择 WebSocket 因为需要双向通信（前端也可发送控制命令）

package com.dormpower.model;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.Data;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.UUID;

@Data
@Entity
@Table(name = "device")
public class Device {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(unique = true, nullable = false, length = 50)
    private String deviceId; // 设备唯一标识（如 MAC 地址）

    @Column(nullable = false, length = 100)
    private String name; // 设备名称

    private String description;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    private DeviceType type; // 设备类型

    @Column(length = 50)
    private String model; // 设备型号

    @Column(length = 50)
    private String firmwareVersion; // 固件版本

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    private DeviceStatus status = DeviceStatus.OFFLINE; // 设备状态

    @Column(length = 50)
    private String ipAddress;

    @Column(length = 50)
    private String macAddress;

    private LocalDateTime lastOnlineAt;
    private LocalDateTime lastOfflineAt;

    private LocalDateTime createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    private LocalDateTime updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();

    @Column(name = "room_id")
    private UUID roomId; // 关联房间

    @Column(name = "group_id")
    private UUID groupId; // 关联设备组

    @PreUpdate
    protected void onUpdate() {
        updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    }
}

enum DeviceType {
    SOCKET,    // 智能插座
    STRIP,     // 智能排插
    METER      // 智能电表
}

enum DeviceStatus {
    ONLINE,    // 在线
    OFFLINE,   // 离线
    FAULT      // 故障
}

docs.title: 3.2 DeviceServiceImpl 实现
docs.text:
文件位置: backend/src/main/java/com/dormpower/service/impl/DeviceServiceImpl.java

package com.dormpower.service.impl;

import com.dormpower.dto.request.CreateDeviceRequest;
import com.dormpower.dto.response.DeviceResponse;
import com.dormpower.model.Device;
import com.dormpower.model.DeviceStatus;
import com.dormpower.repository.DeviceRepository;
import com.dormpower.service.DeviceService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class DeviceServiceImpl implements DeviceService {

    private final DeviceRepository deviceRepository;

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public DeviceResponse createDevice(CreateDeviceRequest request) {
        // 检查设备 ID 是否重复
        if (deviceRepository.existsByDeviceId(request.getDeviceId())) {
            throw new RuntimeException("设备 ID 已存在");
        }

        Device device = new Device();
        device.setDeviceId(request.getDeviceId());
        device.setName(request.getName());
        device.setDescription(request.getDescription());
        device.setType(request.getType());
        device.setModel(request.getModel());
        device.setRoomId(request.getRoomId());
        device.setGroupId(request.getGroupId());
        device.setStatus(DeviceStatus.OFFLINE);

        Device saved = deviceRepository.save(device);
        return toResponse(saved);
    }

    @Override
    public DeviceResponse getDevice(UUID id) {
        Device device = deviceRepository.findById(id)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("设备不存在"));
        return toResponse(device);
    }

    @Override
    public List<DeviceResponse> getDevices(UUID roomId, UUID groupId, DeviceStatus status) {
        List<Device> devices;

        if (roomId != null) {
            devices = deviceRepository.findByRoomId(roomId);
        } else if (groupId != null) {
            devices = deviceRepository.findByGroupId(groupId);
        } else if (status != null) {
            devices = deviceRepository.findByStatus(status);
        } else {
            devices = deviceRepository.findAll();
        }

        return devices.stream().map(this::toResponse).collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public DeviceResponse updateDevice(UUID id, CreateDeviceRequest request) {
        Device device = deviceRepository.findById(id)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("设备不存在"));

        device.setName(request.getName());
        device.setDescription(request.getDescription());
        device.setRoomId(request.getRoomId());
        device.setGroupId(request.getGroupId());

        Device updated = deviceRepository.save(device);
        return toResponse(updated);
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public void deleteDevice(UUID id) {
        deviceRepository.deleteById(id);
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public void updateDeviceStatus(String deviceId, DeviceStatus status) {
        Device device = deviceRepository.findByDeviceId(deviceId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("设备不存在"));

        DeviceStatus oldStatus = device.getStatus();
        device.setStatus(status);

        if (status == DeviceStatus.ONLINE) {
            device.setLastOnlineAt(java.time.LocalDateTime.now());
        } else if (status == DeviceStatus.OFFLINE) {
            device.setLastOfflineAt(java.time.LocalDateTime.now());
        }

        deviceRepository.save(device);

        // TODO: 记录状态变更历史
    }

    private DeviceResponse toResponse(Device device) {
        DeviceResponse response = new DeviceResponse();
        response.setId(device.getId());
        response.setDeviceId(device.getDeviceId());
        response.setName(device.getName());
        response.setDescription(device.getDescription());
        response.setType(device.getType());
        response.setModel(device.getModel());
        response.setFirmwareVersion(device.getFirmwareVersion());
        response.setStatus(device.getStatus());
        response.setRoomId(device.getRoomId());
        response.setGroupId(device.getGroupId());
        response.setCreatedAt(device.getCreatedAt());
        return response;
    }
}

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.dto.request.CreateDeviceRequest;
import com.dormpower.dto.response.DeviceResponse;
import com.dormpower.model.DeviceStatus;
import com.dormpower.service.DeviceService;
import jakarta.validation.Valid;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/devices")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class DeviceController {

    private final DeviceService deviceService;

    @PostMapping
    @PreAuthorize("hasAuthority('device:create')")
    public ResponseEntity<DeviceResponse> createDevice(
        @Valid @RequestBody CreateDeviceRequest request
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(deviceService.createDevice(request));
    }

    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAuthority('device:read')")
    public ResponseEntity<DeviceResponse> getDevice(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(deviceService.getDevice(id));
    }

    @GetMapping
    @PreAuthorize("hasAuthority('device:read')")
    public ResponseEntity<List<DeviceResponse>> getDevices(
        @RequestParam(required = false) UUID roomId,
        @RequestParam(required = false) UUID groupId,
        @RequestParam(required = false) DeviceStatus status
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(deviceService.getDevices(roomId, groupId, status));
    }

    @PutMapping("/{id}")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAuthority('device:update')")
    public ResponseEntity<DeviceResponse> updateDevice(
        @PathVariable UUID id,
        @Valid @RequestBody CreateDeviceRequest request
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(deviceService.updateDevice(id, request));
    }

    @DeleteMapping("/{id}")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAuthority('device:delete')")
    public ResponseEntity<Void> deleteDevice(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        deviceService.deleteDevice(id);
        return ResponseEntity.ok().build();
    }
}

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.dto.request.CreateDeviceRequest;
import com.dormpower.dto.response.DeviceResponse;
import com.dormpower.model.DeviceType;
import com.dormpower.service.DeviceService;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.WebMvcTest;
import org.springframework.boot.test.mock.mockito.MockBean;
import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
import org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;
import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;
import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.request.MockMvcRequestBuilders.*;
import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers.*;

@WebMvcTest(DeviceController.class)
class DeviceControllerTest {

    @Autowired
    private MockMvc mockMvc;

    @MockBean
    private DeviceService deviceService;

    @Autowired
    private ObjectMapper objectMapper;

    @Test
    void testCreateDevice_Success() throws Exception {
        CreateDeviceRequest request = new CreateDeviceRequest();
        request.setDeviceId("AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF");
        request.setName("测试设备");
        request.setType(DeviceType.SOCKET);

        DeviceResponse response = new DeviceResponse();
        response.setId(UUID.randomUUID());
        response.setDeviceId("AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF");
        response.setName("测试设备");

        when(deviceService.createDevice(any(CreateDeviceRequest.class)))
            .thenReturn(response);

        mockMvc.perform(post("/api/devices")
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
                .content(objectMapper.writeValueAsString(request)))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.deviceId").value("AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF"))
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.name").value("测试设备"));
    }

    @Test
    void testGetDevice() throws Exception {
        UUID id = UUID.randomUUID();
        DeviceResponse response = new DeviceResponse();
        response.setId(id);
        response.setName("测试设备");

        when(deviceService.getDevice(id)).thenReturn(response);

        mockMvc.perform(get("/api/devices/{id}", id))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.name").value("测试设备"));
    }
}

import axios from 'axios';
import type { Device, CreateDeviceRequest, DeviceGroup } from '@/types/device';

const API_BASE = '/api/devices';

export const deviceApi = {
  // 创建设备
  async createDevice(data: CreateDeviceRequest): Promise<Device> {
    const response = await axios.post(API_BASE, data);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取设备列表
  async getDevices(params?: {
    roomId?: string;
    groupId?: string;
    status?: string;
  }): Promise<Device[]> {
    const response = await axios.get(API_BASE, { params });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取设备详情
  async getDevice(id: string): Promise<Device> {
    const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/${id}`);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 更新设备
  async updateDevice(id: string, data: CreateDeviceRequest): Promise<Device> {
    const response = await axios.put(`${API_BASE}/${id}`, data);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 删除设备
  async deleteDevice(id: string): Promise<void> {
    await axios.delete(`${API_BASE}/${id}`);
  }
};

// 设备组 API
const GROUP_API_BASE = '/api/device-groups';

export const deviceGroupApi = {
  async createGroup(data: { name: string; description?: string }): Promise<DeviceGroup> {
    const response = await axios.post(GROUP_API_BASE, data);
    return response.data;
  },

  async getGroups(): Promise<DeviceGroup[]> {
    const response = await axios.get(GROUP_API_BASE);
    return response.data;
  },

  async deleteGroup(id: string): Promise<void> {
    await axios.delete(`${GROUP_API_BASE}/${id}`);
  }
};

const devices = ref<Device[]>([]);

const isEdit = ref(false);
const submitting = ref(false);

const filters = reactive({
  status: '',
  keyword: ''
});

const pagination = reactive({
  page: 1,
  size: 20,
  total: 0
});

const form = reactive<CreateDeviceRequest>({
  deviceId: '',
  name: '',
  type: 'SOCKET',
  model: '',

});

const rules: FormRules = {
  deviceId: [{ required: true, message: '请输入设备 ID', trigger: 'blur' }],
  name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入设备名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择设备类型', trigger: 'change' }]
};

const formRef = ref<FormInstance>();

const loadDevices = async () => {
  loading.value = true;
  try {
    const data = await deviceApi.getDevices({
      status: filters.status || undefined,
      roomId: undefined,
      groupId: undefined
    });
    devices.value = data;
    pagination.total = data.length;
  } catch (error: any) {
    ElMessage.error(error.response?.data?.message || '加载失败');
  } finally {
    loading.value = false;
  }
};

const handleCreate = () => {
  isEdit.value = false;
  Object.assign(form, {
    deviceId: '',
    name: '',
    type: 'SOCKET',
    model: '',
    description: ''
  });
  dialogVisible.value = true;
};

const handleEdit = (row: Device) => {
  isEdit.value = true;
  Object.assign(form, row);
  dialogVisible.value = true;
};

const handleDelete = async (row: Device) => {
  try {
    await ElMessageBox.confirm('确定要删除该设备吗？', '提示', {
      type: 'warning'
    });
    await deviceApi.deleteDevice(row.id);
    ElMessage.success('删除成功');
    loadDevices();
  } catch (error: any) {
    if (error !== 'cancel') {
      ElMessage.error(error.response?.data?.message || '删除失败');
    }
  }
};

const handleSubmit = async () => {
  if (!formRef.value) return;

  await formRef.value.validate(async (valid) => {
    if (!valid) return;

    submitting.value = true;
    try {
      if (isEdit.value) {
        await deviceApi.updateDevice(form.deviceId, form);
      } else {
        await deviceApi.createDevice(form);
      }
      ElMessage.success(isEdit.value ? '更新成功' : '创建成功');
      dialogVisible.value = false;
      loadDevices();
    } catch (error: any) {
      ElMessage.error(error.response?.data?.message || '操作失败');
    } finally {
      submitting.value = false;
    }
  });
};

const handleSearch = () => {
  loadDevices();
};

const getStatusType = (status: string) => {
  const types: Record<string, string> = {
    ONLINE: 'success',
    OFFLINE: 'info',
    FAULT: 'danger'
  };
  return types[status] || 'info';
};

const getStatusText = (status: string) => {
  const texts: Record<string, string> = {
    ONLINE: '在线',
    OFFLINE: '离线',
    FAULT: '故障'
  };
  return texts[status] || status;
};

onMounted(() => {
  loadDevices();
});
</script>

docs.title: 步骤 4：状态管理
docs.text:
文件位置: frontend/src/stores/device.ts

import { defineStore } from 'pinia';
import { ref } from 'vue';
import type { Device, DeviceGroup } from '@/types/device';
import { deviceApi, deviceGroupApi } from '@/api/device';

export const useDeviceStore = defineStore('device', () => {
  const devices = ref<Device[]>([]);
  const groups = ref<DeviceGroup[]>([]);
  const loading = ref(false);

  // 加载设备列表
  async function loadDevices(params?: any) {
    loading.value = true;
    try {
      devices.value = await deviceApi.getDevices(params);
    } finally {
      loading.value = false;
    }
  }

  // 加载设备组
  async function loadGroups() {
    groups.value = await deviceGroupApi.getGroups();
  }

  // 添加设备
  async function addDevice(device: Device) {
    devices.value.push(device);
  }

  // 更新设备
  function updateDevice(id: string, updates: Partial<Device>) {
    const index = devices.value.findIndex(d => d.id === id);
    if (index !== -1) {
      devices.value[index] = { ...devices.value[index], ...updates };
    }
  }

  // 删除设备
  function removeDevice(id: string) {
    const index = devices.value.findIndex(d => d.id === id);
    if (index !== -1) {
      devices.value.splice(index, 1);
    }
  }

  return {
    devices,
    groups,
    loading,
    loadDevices,
    loadGroups,
    addDevice,
    updateDevice,
    removeDevice
  };
});

docs.title: 2.1 业务场景
docs.text:
场景 1：设备数据上报

智能插座 → MQTT Broker → MqttBridge → 数据验证 → 存储到 Telemetry 表 → WebSocket 推送 → 前端实时更新

场景 2：历史数据查询

用户选择设备和时间范围 → 后端查询 Telemetry 表 → 分页返回 → 前端渲染图表

场景 3：实时监控

设备上报数据 → WebSocket 推送 → 前端订阅 → 实时更新图表（1 秒刷新）

场景 4：数据导出

用户选择导出范围 → 后端生成 CSV 文件 → 返回下载链接 → 用户下载

docs.title: 2.2 功能需求清单
docs.text: 功能 描述 优先级 遥测数据接收 通过 MQTT 接收设备上报数据 P0 遥测数据存储 保存到数据库，支持高频写入 P0 实时数据推送 WebSocket 推送实时数据 P0 历史数据查询 按时间范围、设备查询 P0 数据导出 导出 CSV/Excel 格式 P1 实时监控 1 秒刷新实时数据 P1 系统指标采集 CPU、内存、设备在线率 P2 定时任务管理 数据清理等定时任务 P2

docs.title: 2.3 技术选型与理由
docs.text:
技术 说明 版本 选型理由 MQTT 设备数据上报协议 3.1.1 ✅ 发布/订阅模式：设备发布数据，服务端订阅消费✅ 主题过滤：支持通配符主题（dorm/telemetry/#）✅ QoS 保障：关键数据使用 QoS 1 确保到达✅ 低延迟：适合高频实时数据传输 WebSocket 实时数据推送 - ✅ 全双工通信：服务端主动推送数据到前端✅ 低延迟：一次握手，持续通信✅ 轻量协议：相比 HTTP 轮询，减少带宽消耗✅ Spring 支持：Spring WebSocket 简化开发 Spring Scheduler 定时任务调度 3.2.x ✅ 内置支持：Spring Boot 内置，无需额外依赖✅ Cron 表达式：灵活的调度策略✅ 异步执行：支持@Async 异步任务⚠️ 局限性：单机调度，分布式场景需用 Quartz/XXL-JOB ECharts 图表库 5.x ✅ 丰富图表：支持折线图、柱状图、仪表盘等✅ 大数据量：支持 canvas 渲染，性能优秀✅ 响应式：自适应不同屏幕尺寸✅ 中文文档：百度开源，文档完善

技术对比与取舍： - WebSocket vs SSE：选择 WebSocket 因为需要双向通信（前端也可发送控制命令） - ECharts vs Chart.js：选择 ECharts 因为功能更丰富，适合复杂的数据可视化场景 - 定时任务 vs 实时计算：教学场景用定时任务简化实现，生产环境考虑 Flink 实时计算 | PostgreSQL | 时序数据存储 | 14+ |

package com.dormpower.model;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.Data;
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.UUID;

@Data
@Entity
@Table(name = "telemetry", indexes = {
    @Index(name = "idx_telemetry_device_time", columnList = "deviceId, timestamp"),
    @Index(name = "idx_telemetry_timestamp", columnList = "timestamp")
})
public class Telemetry {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(name = "device_id", nullable = false)
    private UUID deviceId;

    @Column(precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private BigDecimal voltage; // 电压（V）

    @Column(precision = 10, scale = 3)
    private BigDecimal current; // 电流（A）

    @Column(precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private BigDecimal power; // 功率（W）

    @Column(precision = 5, scale = 3)
    private BigDecimal powerFactor; // 功率因数

    @Column(precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private BigDecimal frequency; // 频率（Hz）

    @Column(precision = 12, scale = 4)
    private BigDecimal activeEnergy; // 有功电能（kWh）

    @Column(precision = 12, scale = 4)
    private BigDecimal reactiveEnergy; // 无功电能（kVarh）

    @Column(precision = 5, scale = 2)
    private BigDecimal temperature; // 温度（℃）

    @Column(precision = 5, scale = 2)
    private BigDecimal humidity; // 湿度（%）

    @Column(nullable = false)
    private LocalDateTime timestamp; // 数据采集时间

    private LocalDateTime createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();

    private Integer quality; // 数据质量标识
}

package com.dormpower.repository;

import com.dormpower.model.Telemetry;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;
import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.Query;
import org.springframework.data.repository.query.Param;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;

import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
import java.util.UUID;

@Repository
public interface TelemetryRepository extends JpaRepository<Telemetry, UUID> {

    Page<Telemetry> findByDeviceIdAndTimestampBetween(
        UUID deviceId,
        LocalDateTime startTime,
        LocalDateTime endTime,
        Pageable pageable
    );

    List<Telemetry> findByDeviceIdAndTimestampBetweenOrderByTimestampDesc(
        UUID deviceId,
        LocalDateTime startTime,
        LocalDateTime endTime
    );

    Optional<Telemetry> findTopByDeviceIdOrderByTimestampDesc(UUID deviceId);

    @Query("SELECT t FROM Telemetry t WHERE t.deviceId IN :deviceIds AND t.timestamp BETWEEN :startTime AND :endTime")
    List<Telemetry> findByDeviceIdsAndTimestampBetween(
        @Param("deviceIds") List<UUID> deviceIds,
        @Param("startTime") LocalDateTime startTime,
        @Param("endTime") LocalDateTime endTime
    );

    @Query("SELECT AVG(t.power) FROM Telemetry t WHERE t.deviceId = :deviceId AND t.timestamp BETWEEN :startTime AND :endTime")
    Optional<Double> findAveragePower(
        @Param("deviceId") UUID deviceId,
        @Param("startTime") LocalDateTime startTime,
        @Param("endTime") LocalDateTime endTime
    );
}

package com.dormpower.repository;

import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;

import org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;

import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

@Repository
public interface CollectionRecordRepository extends JpaRepository<CollectionRecord, UUID> {

    List<CollectionRecord> findByDeviceIdAndTimestampBetween(
        UUID deviceId,
        LocalDateTime startTime,
        LocalDateTime endTime
    );

    List<CollectionRecord> findByStatusAndTimestampBetween(
        CollectionStatus status,
        LocalDateTime startTime,
        LocalDateTime endTime
    );

    @Query("SELECT COUNT(c) FROM CollectionRecord c WHERE c.deviceId = :deviceId AND c.collectionType = :type AND c.timestamp BETWEEN :startTime AND :endTime")
    Long countByDeviceIdAndTypeAndTimeRange(
        @Param("deviceId") UUID deviceId,
        @Param("type") CollectionType type,
        @Param("startTime") LocalDateTime startTime,
        @Param("endTime") LocalDateTime endTime
    );
}

package com.dormpower.service.impl;

import com.dormpower.dto.TelemetryData;
import com.dormpower.model.Telemetry;
import com.dormpower.repository.TelemetryRepository;
import com.dormpower.service.TelemetryService;
import com.dormpower.websocket.WebSocketManager;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.modelmapper.ModelMapper;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;

import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
import java.util.UUID;

@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class TelemetryServiceImpl implements TelemetryService {

    private final TelemetryRepository telemetryRepository;
    private final ModelMapper modelMapper;
    private final WebSocketManager webSocketManager;

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public void saveTelemetry(TelemetryData data) {
        Telemetry telemetry = modelMapper.map(data, Telemetry.class);
        telemetry.setTimestamp(LocalDateTime.now());
        telemetryRepository.save(telemetry);

        // 通过 WebSocket 推送实时数据
        webSocketManager.sendTelemetryUpdate(telemetry);
    }

    @Override
    public Page<Telemetry> getTelemetryByDevice(
        UUID deviceId,
        LocalDateTime startTime,
        LocalDateTime endTime,
        Pageable pageable
    ) {
        return telemetryRepository.findByDeviceIdAndTimestampBetween(
            deviceId, startTime, endTime, pageable
        );
    }

    @Override
    public Optional<Telemetry> getLatestTelemetry(UUID deviceId) {
        return telemetryRepository.findTopByDeviceIdOrderByTimestampDesc(deviceId);
    }

    @Override
    public List<Telemetry> getBatchTelemetry(
        List<UUID> deviceIds,
        LocalDateTime startTime,
        LocalDateTime endTime
    ) {
        return telemetryRepository.findByDeviceIdsAndTimestampBetween(
            deviceIds, startTime, endTime
        );
    }

    @Override
    public Optional<Double> getAveragePower(UUID deviceId, LocalDateTime startTime, LocalDateTime endTime) {
        return telemetryRepository.findAveragePower(deviceId, startTime, endTime);
    }
}

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.model.Telemetry;
import com.dormpower.service.TelemetryService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
import org.springframework.format.annotation.DateTimeFormat;
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
import java.util.UUID;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/telemetry")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class TelemetryController {

    private final TelemetryService telemetryService;

    @GetMapping
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('device:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Page<Telemetry>> getTelemetry(
        @RequestParam UUID deviceId,
        @RequestParam @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) LocalDateTime startTime,
        @RequestParam @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) LocalDateTime endTime,
        Pageable pageable
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(
            telemetryService.getTelemetryByDevice(deviceId, startTime, endTime, pageable)
        );
    }

    @GetMapping("/latest")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('device:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Telemetry> getLatestTelemetry(@RequestParam UUID deviceId) {
        return telemetryService.getLatestTelemetry(deviceId)
            .map(ResponseEntity::ok)
            .orElse(ResponseEntity.notFound().build());
    }

    @PostMapping("/batch")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('device:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<List<Telemetry>> getBatchTelemetry(
        @RequestBody BatchTelemetryRequest request
    ) {
        List<Telemetry> telemetry = telemetryService.getBatchTelemetry(
            request.getDeviceIds(),
            request.getStartTime(),
            request.getEndTime()
        );
        return ResponseEntity.ok(telemetry);
    }

    @GetMapping("/average-power")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('device:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Double> getAveragePower(
        @RequestParam UUID deviceId,
        @RequestParam @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) LocalDateTime startTime,
        @RequestParam @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) LocalDateTime endTime
    ) {
        return telemetryService.getAveragePower(deviceId, startTime, endTime)
            .map(ResponseEntity::ok)
            .orElse(ResponseEntity.notFound().build());
    }

    @Record
    public static class BatchTelemetryRequest {
        private List<UUID> deviceIds;
        private LocalDateTime startTime;
        private LocalDateTime endTime;

        // Getters and Setters
        public List<UUID> getDeviceIds() { return deviceIds; }
        public void setDeviceIds(List<UUID> deviceIds) { this.deviceIds = deviceIds; }
        public LocalDateTime getStartTime() { return startTime; }
        public void setStartTime(LocalDateTime startTime) { this.startTime = startTime; }
        public LocalDateTime getEndTime() { return endTime; }
        public void setEndTime(LocalDateTime endTime) { this.endTime = endTime; }
    }
}

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.model.Telemetry;
import com.dormpower.service.TelemetryService;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.WebMvcTest;
import org.springframework.boot.test.mock.mockito.MockBean;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
import org.springframework.data.domain.PageImpl;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
import org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc;

import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
import java.util.UUID;

import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.*;
import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;
import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.request.MockMvcRequestBuilders.*;
import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers.*;

@WebMvcTest(TelemetryController.class)
class TelemetryControllerTest {

    @Autowired
    private MockMvc mockMvc;

    @MockBean
    private TelemetryService telemetryService;

    @Autowired
    private ObjectMapper objectMapper;

    @Test
    void testGetTelemetry_WithTimeRange() throws Exception {
        UUID deviceId = UUID.randomUUID();
        LocalDateTime startTime = LocalDateTime.now().minusDays(7);
        LocalDateTime endTime = LocalDateTime.now();

        Telemetry telemetry = new Telemetry();
        telemetry.setId(UUID.randomUUID());
        telemetry.setDeviceId(deviceId);
        telemetry.setVoltage(new BigDecimal("220.5"));
        telemetry.setTimestamp(LocalDateTime.now());

        Page<Telemetry> page = new PageImpl<>(Arrays.asList(telemetry));

        when(telemetryService.getTelemetryByDevice(any(), any(), any(), any()))
            .thenReturn(page);

        mockMvc.perform(get("/api/telemetry")
                .param("deviceId", deviceId.toString())
                .param("startTime", startTime.toString())
                .param("endTime", endTime.toString())
                .param("page", "0")
                .param("size", "10")
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.content").isArray())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.content[0].voltage").value(220.5));
    }

    @Test
    void testGetLatestTelemetry_Success() throws Exception {
        UUID deviceId = UUID.randomUUID();

        Telemetry telemetry = new Telemetry();
        telemetry.setId(UUID.randomUUID());
        telemetry.setDeviceId(deviceId);
        telemetry.setPower(new BigDecimal("100.5"));

        when(telemetryService.getLatestTelemetry(deviceId))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(telemetry));

        mockMvc.perform(get("/api/telemetry/latest")
                .param("deviceId", deviceId.toString())
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.power").value(100.5));
    }

    @Test
    void testGetLatestTelemetry_NotFound() throws Exception {
        UUID deviceId = UUID.randomUUID();

        when(telemetryService.getLatestTelemetry(deviceId))
            .thenReturn(Optional.empty());

        mockMvc.perform(get("/api/telemetry/latest")
                .param("deviceId", deviceId.toString())
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON))
            .andExpect(status().isNotFound());
    }

    @Test
    void testGetBatchTelemetry() throws Exception {
        List<UUID> deviceIds = Arrays.asList(UUID.randomUUID(), UUID.randomUUID());
        LocalDateTime startTime = LocalDateTime.now().minusDays(1);
        LocalDateTime endTime = LocalDateTime.now();

        Telemetry telemetry = new Telemetry();
        telemetry.setId(UUID.randomUUID());
        telemetry.setDeviceId(deviceIds.get(0));
        telemetry.setCurrent(new BigDecimal("0.5"));

        when(telemetryService.getBatchTelemetry(anyList(), any(), any()))
            .thenReturn(Arrays.asList(telemetry));

        String requestBody = objectMapper.writeValueAsString(
            Map.of(
                "deviceIds", deviceIds,
                "startTime", startTime.toString(),
                "endTime", endTime.toString()
            )
        );

        mockMvc.perform(post("/api/telemetry/batch")
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
                .content(requestBody))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$").isArray())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$[0].current").value(0.5));
    }
}

import axios from 'axios';
import type { Telemetry, TelemetryQuery, BatchTelemetryRequest, CollectionRecord, SystemMetric } from '@/types/telemetry';

const API_BASE = '/api/telemetry';

export const telemetryApi = {
  // 获取遥测数据列表
  async getTelemetry(query: TelemetryQuery) {
    const response = await axios.get(API_BASE, { params: query });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取最新遥测数据
  async getLatestTelemetry(deviceId: string): Promise<Telemetry> {
    const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/latest`, {
      params: { deviceId }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取批量遥测数据
  async getBatchTelemetry(request: BatchTelemetryRequest): Promise<Telemetry[]> {
    const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/batch`, request);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取平均功率
  async getAveragePower(
    deviceId: string,
    startTime: string,
    endTime: string
  ): Promise<number> {
    const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/average-power`, {
      params: { deviceId, startTime, endTime }
    });
    return response.data;
  }
};

// 数据采集 API
const COLLECTION_API_BASE = '/api/collections';

export const collectionApi = {
  // 获取采集记录
  async getCollectionRecords(
    deviceId?: string,
    startTime?: string,
    endTime?: string
  ): Promise<CollectionRecord[]> {
    const response = await axios.get(COLLECTION_API_BASE, {
      params: { deviceId, startTime, endTime }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 手动触发采集
  async triggerCollection(deviceId: string, type: 'TELEMETRY' | 'STATUS' | 'EVENT') {
    const response = await axios.post(`${COLLECTION_API_BASE}/trigger`, {
      deviceId,
      collectionType: type
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取采集统计
  async getCollectionStats(deviceId: string, period: 'DAY' | 'WEEK' | 'MONTH') {
    const response = await axios.get(`${COLLECTION_API_BASE}/stats`, {
      params: { deviceId, period }
    });
    return response.data;
  }
};

// 系统监控 API
const MONITORING_API_BASE = '/api/monitoring';

export const monitoringApi = {
  // 获取系统指标
  async getSystemMetrics(
    metricType?: string,
    startTime?: string,
    endTime?: string
  ): Promise<SystemMetric[]> {
    const response = await axios.get(`${MONITORING_API_BASE}/metrics`, {
      params: { metricType, startTime, endTime }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取设备在线统计
  async getOnlineStats(period: 'HOUR' | 'DAY' | 'WEEK') {
    const response = await axios.get(`${MONITORING_API_BASE}/devices/online-stats`, {
      params: { period }
    });
    return response.data;
  }
};

<template>

          <el-button @click="handleExport">导出</el-button>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
    </el-card>

      <template #header>
        <span>功率趋势图</span>
      </template>
      <div ref="chartRef" style="height: 400px"></div>
    </el-card>

    <el-card class="table-card">
      <template #header>
        <span>遥测数据列表</span>
      </template>
      <el-table :data="telemetryData" stripe v-loading="loading">
        <el-table-column prop="timestamp" label="时间" width="180" />
        <el-table-column prop="voltage" label="电压 (V)" width="100" />
        <el-table-column prop="current" label="电流 (A)" width="100" />

        <el-table-column prop="quality" label="数据质量" width="100" />
      </el-table>

      <el-pagination
        v-model:current-page="currentPage"
        v-model:page-size="pageSize"
        :total="total"
        :page-sizes="[20, 50, 100]"
        layout="total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper"
        @current-change="handlePageChange"
        @size-change="handleSizeChange"
      />
    </el-card>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref, reactive, onMounted, nextTick } from 'vue';
import * as echarts from 'echarts';
import type { ECharts } from 'echarts';
import { telemetryApi } from '@/api/telemetry';
import { deviceApi } from '@/api/device';
import type { Telemetry } from '@/types/telemetry';
import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus';

const devices = ref<any[]>([]);
const telemetryData = ref<Telemetry[]>([]);
const loading = ref(false);
const chartRef = ref<HTMLElement>();
let chart: ECharts | null = null;

const queryForm = reactive({
  deviceId: '',
  startTime: '',
  endTime: ''
});

const dateRange = ref<[Date, Date] | null>(null);
const currentPage = ref(1);
const pageSize = ref(20);
const total = ref(0);

// 加载设备列表
const loadDevices = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await deviceApi.getDevices();
    devices.value = response.content || response;
    if (devices.value.length > 0) {
      queryForm.deviceId = devices.value[0].id;
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to load devices:', error);
  }
};

// 加载遥测数据
const loadTelemetry = async () => {
  if (!queryForm.deviceId) return;

  loading.value = true;
  try {
    const response = await telemetryApi.getTelemetry({
      deviceId: queryForm.deviceId,
      startTime: queryForm.startTime,
      endTime: queryForm.endTime,
      page: currentPage.value - 1,
      size: pageSize.value
    });

    telemetryData.value = response.content || [];
    total.value = response.totalElements || 0;

    updateChart();
  } catch (error: any) {
    ElMessage.error('加载遥测数据失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
  } finally {
    loading.value = false;
  }
};

// 更新日期范围
const handleDateChange = (dates: [Date, Date] | null) => {
  if (dates) {
    queryForm.startTime = dates[0].toISOString();
    queryForm.endTime = dates[1].toISOString();
  }
};

// 查询
const handleQuery = () => {
  currentPage.value = 1;
  loadTelemetry();
};

// 分页变化
const handlePageChange = (page: number) => {
  currentPage.value = page;
  loadTelemetry();
};

const handleSizeChange = (size: number) => {
  pageSize.value = size;
  currentPage.value = 1;
  loadTelemetry();
};

// 更新图表
const updateChart = () => {
  if (!chart) return;

  const timestamps = telemetryData.value.map(item => item.timestamp);
  const powers = telemetryData.value.map(item => item.power || 0);

  chart.setOption({
    xAxis: {
      type: 'category',
      data: timestamps
    },
    yAxis: {
      type: 'value',
      name: '功率 (W)'
    },
    series: [{
      data: powers,
      type: 'line',
      smooth: true
    }]
  });
};

// 导出
const handleExport = async () => {
  try {
    ElMessage.success('导出功能开发中...');
    // TODO: 实现导出功能
  } catch (error: any) {
    ElMessage.error('导出失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
  }
};

onMounted(() => {
  loadDevices();

  nextTick(() => {
    if (chartRef.value) {
      chart = echarts.init(chartRef.value);
    }
  });
});
</script>

  margin-bottom: 20px;

  { name: '电压', value: 0, unit: 'V' },
  { name: '电流', value: 0, unit: 'A' },
  { name: '功率', value: 0, unit: 'W' },
  { name: '温度', value: 0, unit: '℃' }
]);

const dataPoints = ref<{ time: string; power: number }[]>([]);
const isConnected = ref(false);

// WebSocket 连接
const { connect, disconnect, subscribe } = useWebSocket();

// 加载设备列表
const loadDevices = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await deviceApi.getDevices();
    devices.value = response.content || response;
    if (devices.value.length > 0) {
      selectedDeviceId.value = devices.value[0].id;
      startMonitoring();
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to load devices:', error);
  }
};

// 开始监控
const startMonitoring = async () => {
  if (!selectedDeviceId.value) return;

  // 连接 WebSocket
  connect();

  // 订阅设备遥测主题
  subscribe(`telemetry:${selectedDeviceId.value}`, (data) => {
    updateMetrics(data);
    updateRealtimeChart(data);
    isConnected.value = true;
  });

  // 加载初始数据
  try {
    const latest = await telemetryApi.getLatestTelemetry(selectedDeviceId.value);
    updateMetrics(latest);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to load latest telemetry:', error);
  }
};

// 更新指标
const updateMetrics = (data: any) => {
  metrics[0].value = data.voltage || 0;
  metrics[1].value = data.current || 0;
  metrics[2].value = data.power || 0;
  metrics[3].value = data.temperature || 0;
};

// 更新实时图表
const updateRealtimeChart = (data: any) => {
  const now = new Date().toLocaleTimeString();
  dataPoints.value.push({ time: now, power: data.power || 0 });

  // 只保留最近 60 个点
  if (dataPoints.value.length > 60) {
    dataPoints.value.shift();
  }

  if (chart) {
    chart.setOption({
      xAxis: {
        data: dataPoints.value.map(p => p.time)
      },
      series: [{
        data: dataPoints.value.map(p => p.power)
      }]
    });
  }
};

// 设备切换
const handleDeviceChange = () => {
  dataPoints.value = [];
  startMonitoring();
};

onMounted(() => {
  loadDevices();

  if (chartRef.value) {
    chart = echarts.init(chartRef.value);
    chart.setOption({
      xAxis: {
        type: 'category',
        data: []
      },
      yAxis: {
        type: 'value',
        name: '功率 (W)'
      },
      series: [{
        type: 'line',
        smooth: true,
        data: []
      }]
    });
  }
});

onUnmounted(() => {
  disconnect();
  if (chart) {
    chart.dispose();
  }
});
</script>

docs.title: 问题 1：大量数据写入导致数据库压力大
docs.text:
现象: 数据写入慢，CPU 占用高

解决方案:

// 使用批量插入
@Transactional
public void batchSaveTelemetry(List<TelemetryData> dataList) {
    List<Telemetry> telemetryList = dataList.stream()
        .map(data -> modelMapper.map(data, Telemetry.class))
        .collect(Collectors.toList());

    // 分批保存，每 1000 条一批
    int batchSize = 1000;
    for (int i = 0; i < telemetryList.size(); i += batchSize) {
        int end = Math.min(i + batchSize, telemetryList.size());
        telemetryRepository.saveAll(telemetryList.subList(i, end));
    }
}

docs.title: 问题 2：实时数据推送延迟
docs.text:
现象: 前端收到数据延迟超过 1 秒

解决方案:

// 使用异步推送
@Async
public void sendTelemetryUpdate(Telemetry telemetry) {
    String message = objectMapper.writeValueAsString(telemetry);
    webSocketManager.sendToTopic("telemetry:" + telemetry.getDeviceId(), message);
}

docs.title: 问题 3：图表数据点过多渲染慢
docs.text:
现象: 图表卡顿，浏览器 CPU 占用高

解决方案:

// 数据降采样
function downsample(data: number[], threshold: number) {
    if (data.length <= threshold) return data;

    const sampled: number[] = [];
    const step = Math.floor(data.length / threshold);

    for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i += step) {
        sampled.push(data[i]);
    }

    return sampled;
}

docs.title: 2.1 业务场景
docs.text:
场景 1：月度账单生成

每月初定时任务 → 获取上月用电数据 → 应用电价规则 → 计算电费 → 生成账单 → 推送通知

场景 2：在线充值缴费

用户选择充值金额 → 调用支付接口 → 更新房间余额 → 自动扣缴欠费 → 记录充值流水

场景 3：电费试算

用户选择时间范围 → 获取用电数据 → 应用电价规则 → 试算电费 → 返回明细

场景 4：自动充值

定时检查余额 → 余额低于阈值 → 自动触发充值 → 更新余额 → 发送通知

docs.title: 2.2 功能需求清单
docs.text: 功能 描述 优先级 电费计算 支持峰谷、阶梯电价 P0 账单生成 按月自动生成账单 P0 账单查询 按房间、状态、周期查询 P0 在线支付 支持多种支付方式 P0 充值管理 在线充值、记录查询 P0 余额管理 余额查询、预警 P1 自动充值 余额不足自动充值 P2 账单导出 导出 PDF/Excel P2

docs.title: 2.3 技术选型与理由
docs.text:
技术 说明 版本 选型理由 BigDecimal 精确金额计算 - ✅ 精确计算：避免浮点数精度丢失问题✅ 多种舍入模式：支持 8 种舍入模式（HALF_UP 等）✅ 金融标准：金融行业强制使用⚠️ 注意：实际项目使用 double，建议改为 BigDecimal✅ 最佳实践：金额字段必须使用 BigDecimal，数据库用 DECIMAL 类型 Spring Scheduler 定时任务 3.2.x ✅ 月度账单：每月初自动生成上月账单✅ 余额检查：定期检查房间余额，触发预警✅ 简单配置：@Scheduled(cron = "0 0 0 1 * ?") Strategy Pattern 电价策略模式 - ✅ 解耦算法：电价算法与业务逻辑分离✅ 易扩展：新增电价策略无需修改现有代码✅ 符合开闭原则：对扩展开放，对修改关闭 iText PDF 生成 7.x ✅ 账单导出：生成 PDF 格式账单✅ 模板支持：支持 HTML/CSS 模板⚠️ 替代方案：实际项目使用 EasyExcel 导出 Excel EasyExcel Excel 导出 3.x ✅ 性能优秀：流式处理，避免 OOM✅ 阿里开源：经过大规模生产验证✅ 注解驱动：@ExcelProperty 简化配置

技术对比与取舍： - BigDecimal vs double：教学演示用 double 简化代码，实际项目必须用 BigDecimal - 定时任务 vs 消息队列：简单场景用定时任务，复杂场景用消息队列延迟处理 - PDF vs Excel：PDF 适合打印，Excel 适合数据分析，根据场景选择

package com.dormpower.model;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.Data;
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.UUID;

@Data
@Entity
@Table(name = "electricity_bill", indexes = {
    @Index(name = "idx_bill_room_period", columnList = "roomId, billingPeriod"),
    @Index(name = "idx_bill_status", columnList = "status")
})
public class ElectricityBill {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(unique = true, nullable = false, length = 50)
    private String billNumber; // 账单编号

    @Column(name = "room_id", nullable = false)
    private UUID roomId;

    @Column(nullable = false, length = 7)
    private String billingPeriod; // 计费周期，如 2024-01

    @Column(nullable = false, precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private BigDecimal electricityAmount; // 用电量（kWh）

    @Column(nullable = false, precision = 10, scale = 4)
    private BigDecimal unitPrice; // 单价

    @Column(nullable = false, precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private BigDecimal totalAmount; // 总金额

    @Column(precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private BigDecimal paidAmount; // 已付金额

    @Column(precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private BigDecimal remainingAmount; // 剩余金额

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private BillStatus status = BillStatus.UNPAID;

    private LocalDate dueDate; // 截止日期

    private LocalDateTime paidAt; // 支付时间

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    private PaymentMethod paymentMethod; // 支付方式

    private UUID paidBy; // 支付人

    private LocalDateTime createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    private LocalDateTime updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();

    @PreUpdate
    protected void onUpdate() {
        updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    }
}

enum BillStatus {
    UNPAID, PAID, OVERDUE, CANCELLED
}

enum PaymentMethod {
    BALANCE, ALIPAY, WECHAT, BANK_TRANSFER
}

package com.dormpower.service.impl;

import com.dormpower.dto.BillingRequest;
import com.dormpower.dto.BillingResult;
import com.dormpower.model.ElectricityBill;
import com.dormpower.model.BillStatus;
import com.dormpower.repository.ElectricityBillRepository;
import com.dormpower.service.BillingService;
import com.dormpower.service.TelemetryService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;

import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;
import java.util.UUID;

@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class BillingServiceImpl implements BillingService {

    private final ElectricityBillRepository billRepository;
    private final TelemetryService telemetryService;

    private static final DateTimeFormatter FORMATTER = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM");

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public ElectricityBill generateBill(BillingRequest request) {
        // 检查是否已存在账单
        String period = request.getBillingPeriod();
        UUID roomId = request.getRoomId();

        if (!request.isForceRegenerate()) {
            if (billRepository.findByRoomIdAndBillingPeriod(roomId, period).isPresent()) {
                throw new RuntimeException("账单已存在");
            }
        }

        // 计算电费
        LocalDateTime startTime = LocalDate.parse(period + "-01", DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd"))
            .atStartOfDay();
        LocalDateTime endTime = startTime.plusMonths(1).minusSeconds(1);

        BillingResult result = calculateElectricity(roomId, startTime, endTime);

        // 生成账单
        ElectricityBill bill = new ElectricityBill();
        bill.setBillNumber("BILL-" + period + "-" + UUID.randomUUID().toString().substring(0, 8).toUpperCase());
        bill.setRoomId(roomId);
        bill.setBillingPeriod(period);
        bill.setElectricityAmount(result.getElectricityAmount());
        bill.setUnitPrice(result.getUnitPrice());
        bill.setTotalAmount(result.getTotalAmount());
        bill.setRemainingAmount(result.getTotalAmount());
        bill.setStatus(BillStatus.UNPAID);
        bill.setDueDate(LocalDate.now().plusDays(15));

        return billRepository.save(bill);
    }

    @Override
    public Page<ElectricityBill> getBills(UUID roomId, String period, Pageable pageable) {
        return billRepository.findByRoomId(roomId, pageable);
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public ElectricityBill payBill(UUID billId, UUID userId, String paymentMethod) {
        ElectricityBill bill = billRepository.findById(billId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("账单不存在"));

        if (bill.getStatus() == BillStatus.PAID) {
            throw new RuntimeException("账单已支付");
        }

        // 更新账单状态
        bill.setStatus(BillStatus.PAID);
        bill.setPaidAt(LocalDateTime.now());
        bill.setPaidBy(userId);
        bill.setPaymentMethod(Enum.valueOf(PaymentMethod.class, paymentMethod));
        bill.setPaidAmount(bill.getRemainingAmount());
        bill.setRemainingAmount(BigDecimal.ZERO);

        return billRepository.save(bill);
    }

    @Override
    public BillingResult calculateElectricity(UUID roomId, LocalDateTime startTime, LocalDateTime endTime) {
        // TODO: 实现电费计算逻辑
        // 1. 获取用电数据
        // 2. 应用电价规则
        // 3. 计算总电费
        BillingResult result = new BillingResult();
        result.setElectricityAmount(java.math.BigDecimal.valueOf(100));
        result.setUnitPrice(java.math.BigDecimal.valueOf(0.5));
        result.setTotalAmount(java.math.BigDecimal.valueOf(50));
        return result;
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public void batchGenerateBills(String billingPeriod, UUID buildingId) {
        // TODO: 实现批量生成账单逻辑
        // 1. 获取楼栋所有房间
        // 2. 逐个生成账单
        // 3. 记录生成结果
    }
}

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.dto.BillingRequest;
import com.dormpower.dto.BillingResult;
import com.dormpower.model.ElectricityBill;
import com.dormpower.service.BillingService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
import org.springframework.format.annotation.DateTimeFormat;
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.UUID;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/bills")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class BillingController {

    private final BillingService billingService;

    @PostMapping("/generate")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('bill:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<ElectricityBill> generateBill(@RequestBody BillingRequest request) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(billingService.generateBill(request));
    }

    @GetMapping
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('bill:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Page<ElectricityBill>> getBills(
        @RequestParam UUID roomId,
        @RequestParam(required = false) String period,
        Pageable pageable
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(billingService.getBills(roomId, period, pageable));
    }

    @PostMapping("/{id}/pay")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('bill:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<ElectricityBill> payBill(
        @PathVariable UUID id,
        @RequestParam UUID userId,
        @RequestParam String paymentMethod
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(billingService.payBill(id, userId, paymentMethod));
    }

    @GetMapping("/calculate")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('bill:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<BillingResult> calculateElectricity(
        @RequestParam UUID roomId,
        @RequestParam @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) LocalDateTime startTime,
        @RequestParam @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) LocalDateTime endTime
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(billingService.calculateElectricity(roomId, startTime, endTime));
    }
}

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.dto.BillingRequest;
import com.dormpower.model.ElectricityBill;
import com.dormpower.model.BillStatus;
import com.dormpower.service.BillingService;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.WebMvcTest;
import org.springframework.boot.test.mock.mockito.MockBean;
import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
import org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc;

import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.util.UUID;

import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;
import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;
import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.request.MockMvcRequestBuilders.*;
import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers.*;

@WebMvcTest(BillingController.class)
class BillingControllerTest {

    @Autowired
    private MockMvc mockMvc;

    @MockBean
    private BillingService billingService;

    @Autowired
    private ObjectMapper objectMapper;

    @Test
    void testGenerateBill_Success() throws Exception {
        UUID roomId = UUID.randomUUID();
        BillingRequest request = new BillingRequest();
        request.setRoomId(roomId);
        request.setBillingPeriod("2024-01");
        request.setForceRegenerate(false);

        ElectricityBill bill = new ElectricityBill();
        bill.setId(UUID.randomUUID());
        bill.setBillNumber("BILL-202401-001");
        bill.setTotalAmount(new BigDecimal("50.00"));
        bill.setStatus(BillStatus.UNPAID);

        when(billingService.generateBill(any(BillingRequest.class))).thenReturn(bill);

        mockMvc.perform(post("/api/bills/generate")
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
                .content(objectMapper.writeValueAsString(request)))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.billNumber").value("BILL-202401-001"))
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.totalAmount").value(50.00));
    }

    @Test
    void testPayBill_Success() throws Exception {
        UUID billId = UUID.randomUUID();
        UUID userId = UUID.randomUUID();

        ElectricityBill bill = new ElectricityBill();
        bill.setId(billId);
        bill.setStatus(BillStatus.PAID);

        when(billingService.payBill(billId, userId, "BALANCE")).thenReturn(bill);

        mockMvc.perform(post("/api/bills/{id}/pay", billId)
                .param("userId", userId.toString())
                .param("paymentMethod", "BALANCE"))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.status").value("PAID"));
    }
}

import axios from 'axios';
import type { ElectricityBill, BillingRequest, BillingResult, RoomBalance, RechargeRecord } from '@/types/billing';

const API_BASE = '/api/bills';

export const billingApi = {
  // 生成账单
  async generateBill(request: BillingRequest): Promise<ElectricityBill> {
    const response = await axios.post(API_BASE + '/generate', request);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取账单列表
  async getBills(roomId: string, period?: string, page = 0, size = 20) {
    const response = await axios.get(API_BASE, {
      params: { roomId, period, page, size }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 支付账单
  async payBill(billId: string, userId: string, paymentMethod: string): Promise<ElectricityBill> {
    const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/${billId}/pay`, null, {
      params: { userId, paymentMethod }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 试算电费
  async calculateElectricity(
    roomId: string,
    startTime: string,
    endTime: string
  ): Promise<BillingResult> {
    const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/calculate`, {
      params: { roomId, startTime, endTime }
    });
    return response.data;
  }
};

// 余额管理 API
const BALANCE_API_BASE = '/api/rooms';

export const balanceApi = {
  // 获取房间余额
  async getBalance(roomId: string): Promise<RoomBalance> {
    const response = await axios.get(`${BALANCE_API_BASE}/${roomId}/balance`);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 充值
  async recharge(roomId: string, amount: number, paymentMethod: string, remark?: string) {
    const response = await axios.post(`${BALANCE_API_BASE}/${roomId}/recharge`, {
      amount,
      paymentMethod,
      remark
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取充值记录
  async getRechargeRecords(roomId: string, page = 0, size = 20) {
    const response = await axios.get(`${BALANCE_API_BASE}/${roomId}/recharge-records`, {
      params: { page, size }
    });
    return response.data;
  }
};

<template>

            <el-option label="已支付" value="PAID" />
            <el-option label="逾期" value="OVERDUE" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>

        <el-form-item>
          <el-button type="primary" @click="handleQuery">查询</el-button>
          <el-button type="success" @click="handleGenerate">生成账单</el-button>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
    </el-card>

    <el-card>
      <template #header>
        <span>账单列表</span>
      </template>
      <el-table :data="bills" stripe v-loading="loading">
        <el-table-column prop="billNumber" label="账单编号" width="180" />
        <el-table-column prop="billingPeriod" label="计费周期" width="120" />
        <el-table-column prop="electricityAmount" label="用电量 (kWh)" width="120" />
        <el-table-column prop="totalAmount" label="金额 (元)" width="100" />
        <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="100">
          <template #default="{ row }">
            <el-tag :type="getStatusType(row.status)">
              {{ getStatusText(row.status) }}
            </el-tag>
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column prop="dueDate" label="截止日期" width="120" />
        <el-table-column label="操作" width="150">
          <template #default="{ row }">
            <el-button
              v-if="row.status === 'UNPAID'"
              type="primary"
              size="small"
              @click="handlePay(row)"
            >
              支付
            </el-button>
            <el-button size="small" @click="handleViewDetail(row)">详情</el-button>
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
      </el-table>

      <el-pagination
        v-model:current-page="currentPage"
        v-model:page-size="pageSize"
        :total="total"
        @current-change="handlePageChange"
      />
    </el-card>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref, reactive, onMounted } from 'vue';
import { billingApi } from '@/api/billing';
import { roomApi } from '@/api/room';
import type { ElectricityBill } from '@/types/billing';
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus';

const rooms = ref<any[]>([]);
const bills = ref<ElectricityBill[]>([]);
const loading = ref(false);

const queryForm = reactive({
  roomId: '',
  status: ''
});

const currentPage = ref(1);
const pageSize = ref(20);
const total = ref(0);

// 加载房间列表
const loadRooms = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await roomApi.getRooms();
    rooms.value = response.content || response;
    if (rooms.value.length > 0) {
      queryForm.roomId = rooms.value[0].id;
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to load rooms:', error);
  }
};

// 加载账单列表
const loadBills = async () => {
  if (!queryForm.roomId) return;

  loading.value = true;
  try {
    const response = await billingApi.getBills(
      queryForm.roomId,
      undefined,
      currentPage.value - 1,
      pageSize.value
    );

    bills.value = response.content || [];
    total.value = response.totalElements || 0;
  } catch (error: any) {
    ElMessage.error('加载账单失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
  } finally {
    loading.value = false;
  }
};

// 查询
const handleQuery = () => {
  currentPage.value = 1;
  loadBills();
};

// 生成账单
const handleGenerate = async () => {
  try {
    await ElMessageBox.prompt('请输入计费周期（如 2024-01）', '生成账单', {
      inputPattern: /^\d{4}-\d{2}$/,
      inputErrorMessage: '格式不正确'
    });

    await billingApi.generateBill({
      roomId: queryForm.roomId,
      billingPeriod: '2024-01',
      forceRegenerate: false
    });

    ElMessage.success('账单生成成功');
    loadBills();
  } catch (error: any) {
    if (error !== 'cancel') {
      ElMessage.error('生成账单失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
    }
  }
};

// 支付
const handlePay = async (bill: ElectricityBill) => {
  try {
    await ElMessageBox.confirm('确认支付该账单？', '支付确认');

    await billingApi.payBill(bill.id, 'current-user-id', 'BALANCE');

    ElMessage.success('支付成功');
    loadBills();
  } catch (error: any) {
    if (error !== 'cancel') {
      ElMessage.error('支付失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
    }
  }
};

const handleViewDetail = (bill: ElectricityBill) => {
  ElMessage.info('账单详情功能开发中...');
};

const getStatusType = (status: string) => {
  const types: Record<string, any> = {
    UNPAID: 'warning',
    PAID: 'success',
    OVERDUE: 'danger'
  };
  return types[status] || 'info';
};

const getStatusText = (status: string) => {
  const texts: Record<string, string> = {
    UNPAID: '未支付',
    PAID: '已支付',
    OVERDUE: '逾期'
  };
  return texts[status] || status;
};

onMounted(() => {
  loadRooms();
  loadBills();
});
</script>
