docs.title: 2.1 业务场景
docs.text:
场景 1：设备过载告警

设备上报电流数据 → 规则引擎检测 → 超过阈值 → 触发告警 → 推送通知 → 生成工单 → 处理闭环

场景 2：欠费告警

房间余额检查 → 低于阈值 → 触发告警 → 发送账单提醒 → 用户充值 → 告警消除

场景 3：设备离线告警

设备心跳检测 → 超时未上报 → 判定离线 → 触发告警 → 通知管理员 → 维修处理

场景 4：用电异常告警

采集用电数据 → AI 异常检测 → 发现异常模式 → 触发告警 → 安全预警

docs.title: 2.2 功能需求清单
docs.text: 功能 描述 优先级 告警规则配置 支持阈值、规则表达式 P0 实时告警检测 流式数据检测 P0 告警通知 多渠道推送 P0 告警工单 工单流转处理 P1 告警统计 报表与趋势分析 P1 告警升级 超时未处理升级 P2 告警抑制 避免告警风暴 P2 告警关联 关联告警分析 P3

docs.title: 2.3 技术选型与理由
docs.text:
技术 说明 版本 选型理由 Drools 规则引擎 8.x ✅ 规则与代码分离：业务规则配置化，无需修改代码✅ 灵活表达：DRL 语言支持复杂规则表达✅ 性能优秀：Rete 算法高效匹配规则⚠️ 学习曲线：需要学习 DRL 语法，教学场景简化实现 Spring Event 事件驱动机制 3.2.x ✅ 解耦组件：告警触发与处理解耦✅ 异步处理：支持@EventListener 异步监听✅ 内置支持：Spring 框架自带，无需额外依赖 WebSocket 实时推送 - ✅ 实时通知：告警产生立即推送到前端✅ 多端推送：支持多个客户端同时接收✅ 双向通信：前端可发送告警确认/处理指令 ECharts 统计图表 5.x ✅ 告警趋势：折线图展示告警趋势✅ 告警分布：饼图展示告警类型分布✅ 实时监控：动态刷新告警数据

技术对比与取舍： - 规则引擎 vs if-else：简单场景用 if-else，复杂业务用规则引擎便于维护 - 轮询 vs WebSocket：选择 WebSocket 因为告警需要实时推送，轮询延迟高 - 数据库 vs 时序库：教学用数据库简化，生产环境考虑 InfluxDB 存储告警数据

package com.dormpower.model;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.Data;
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.UUID;

@Data
@Entity
@Table(name = "alarm_rule")
public class AlarmRule {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(nullable = false, length = 100)
    private String ruleName;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private AlarmType alarmType;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private AlarmSeverity severity = AlarmSeverity.WARNING;

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String ruleExpression; // 规则表达式

    @Column(precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private BigDecimal threshold; // 阈值

    @Column(length = 50)
    private String metricName; // 指标名称

    private Integer durationSeconds; // 持续时间（秒）

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String notificationTemplate; // 通知模板

    @ElementCollection
    @CollectionTable(name = "alarm_rule_recipients")
    @Column(name = "recipient")
    private java.util.List<String> recipients; // 通知接收人

    @Column(nullable = false)
    private boolean enabled = true;

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String description;

    private LocalDateTime createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    private LocalDateTime updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();

    @PreUpdate
    protected void onUpdate() {
        updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    }
}

enum AlarmType {
    OVERLOAD,        // 过载
    UNDER_VOLTAGE,   // 欠压
    OVER_VOLTAGE,    // 过压
    OVER_CURRENT,    // 过流
    OVER_USE,        // 超量用电
    DEVICE_OFFLINE,  // 设备离线
    LOW_BALANCE,     // 余额不足
    TEMPERATURE,     // 温度异常
    CUSTOM           // 自定义
}

enum AlarmSeverity {
    INFO,        // 提示
    WARNING,     // 警告
    CRITICAL,    // 严重
    EMERGENCY    // 紧急
}

package com.dormpower.model;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.Data;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.UUID;

@Data
@Entity
@Table(name = "alarm_record", indexes = {
    @Index(name = "idx_alarm_device_time", columnList = "deviceId, createdAt"),
    @Index(name = "idx_alarm_status", columnList = "status")
})
public class AlarmRecord {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(nullable = false, length = 100)
    private String alarmNumber; // 告警编号

    @Column(name = "rule_id", nullable = false)
    private UUID ruleId;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private AlarmType alarmType;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private AlarmSeverity severity;

    @Column(name = "device_id")
    private UUID deviceId;

    @Column(name = "room_id")
    private UUID roomId;

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String alarmMessage; // 告警内容

    @Column(precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private java.math.BigDecimal alarmValue; // 告警值

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private AlarmStatus status = AlarmStatus.ACTIVE;

    private LocalDateTime occurredAt; // 发生时间
    private LocalDateTime acknowledgedAt; // 确认时间
    private LocalDateTime resolvedAt; // 解决时间

    @Column(name = "acknowledged_by")
    private UUID acknowledgedBy; // 确认人

    @Column(name = "resolved_by")
    private UUID resolvedBy; // 解决人

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String resolutionNote; // 解决备注

    private Integer escalateLevel = 0; // 升级级别

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String notificationChannels; // 通知渠道

    private LocalDateTime createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();

    @PrePersist
    protected void onCreate() {
        if (alarmNumber == null) {
            alarmNumber = "ALM-" + LocalDateTime.now().format(
                java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyyMMddHHmmss")) + 
                "-" + UUID.randomUUID().toString().substring(0, 4).toUpperCase();
        }
    }
}

enum AlarmStatus {
    ACTIVE,        // 活动中
    ACKNOWLEDGED,  // 已确认
    RESOLVED,      // 已解决
    SUPPRESSED,    // 已抑制
    CLOSED         // 已关闭
}

package com.dormpower.service.impl;

import com.dormpower.dto.AlarmTriggerRequest;
import com.dormpower.model.AlarmRecord;

@Slf4j
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class AlarmServiceImpl implements AlarmService {

    private final AlarmRuleRepository alarmRuleRepository;
    private final AlarmRecordRepository alarmRecordRepository;
    private final NotificationService notificationService;

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public AlarmRecord triggerAlarm(AlarmTriggerRequest request) {
        AlarmRecord alarm = new AlarmRecord();
        alarm.setRuleId(request.getRuleId());
        alarm.setAlarmType(request.getAlarmType());
        alarm.setSeverity(request.getSeverity());
        alarm.setDeviceId(request.getDeviceId());
        alarm.setRoomId(request.getRoomId());
        alarm.setAlarmMessage(request.getMessage());
        alarm.setAlarmValue(request.getValue());
        alarm.setOccurredAt(LocalDateTime.now());

        alarmRecordRepository.save(alarm);

        // 发送通知
        sendAlarmNotification(alarm);

        log.info("告警触发：{}", alarm.getAlarmNumber());
        return alarm;
    }

    @Override
    public Page<AlarmRecord> getAlarms(UUID deviceId, String status, 
                                       LocalDateTime startTime, LocalDateTime endTime,
                                       Pageable pageable) {
        // TODO: 实现查询逻辑
        return alarmRecordRepository.findAll(pageable);
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public AlarmRecord acknowledgeAlarm(UUID alarmId, UUID userId) {
        AlarmRecord alarm = alarmRecordRepository.findById(alarmId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("告警不存在"));

        alarm.setStatus(AlarmStatus.ACKNOWLEDGED);
        alarm.setAcknowledgedAt(LocalDateTime.now());
        alarm.setAcknowledgedBy(userId);

        return alarmRecordRepository.save(alarm);
    }

        AlarmRecord alarm = alarmRecordRepository.findById(alarmId)

        alarm.setResolvedAt(LocalDateTime.now());
        alarm.setResolvedBy(userId);
        alarm.setResolutionNote(note);

        return alarmRecordRepository.save(alarm);

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.dto.AlarmTriggerRequest;
import com.dormpower.model.AlarmRecord;
import com.dormpower.service.AlarmService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
import org.springframework.format.annotation.DateTimeFormat;
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/alarms")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class AlarmController {

    private final AlarmService alarmService;

    @PostMapping("/trigger")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('alarm:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<AlarmRecord> triggerAlarm(@RequestBody AlarmTriggerRequest request) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(alarmService.triggerAlarm(request));
    }

    @GetMapping
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('alarm:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Page<AlarmRecord>> getAlarms(
        @RequestParam(required = false) UUID deviceId,
        @RequestParam(required = false) String status,
        @RequestParam(required = false) @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) LocalDateTime startTime,
        @RequestParam(required = false) @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) LocalDateTime endTime,
        Pageable pageable
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(
            alarmService.getAlarms(deviceId, status, startTime, endTime, pageable)
        );
    }

    @PostMapping("/{id}/acknowledge")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('alarm:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<AlarmRecord> acknowledgeAlarm(
        @PathVariable UUID id,
        @RequestParam UUID userId
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(alarmService.acknowledgeAlarm(id, userId));
    }

    @PostMapping("/{id}/resolve")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('alarm:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<AlarmRecord> resolveAlarm(
        @PathVariable UUID id,
        @RequestParam UUID userId,
        @RequestParam(required = false) String note
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(alarmService.resolveAlarm(id, userId, note));
    }

    @GetMapping("/rules")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('alarm:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<List<AlarmRecord>> getActiveRules() {
        return ResponseEntity.ok((List) alarmService.getActiveRules());
    }
}

@WebMvcTest(AlarmController.class)
class AlarmControllerTest {

    @Autowired
    private MockMvc mockMvc;

    @MockBean
    private AlarmService alarmService;

    @Autowired
    private ObjectMapper objectMapper;

    @Test
    void testTriggerAlarm_Success() throws Exception {
        AlarmTriggerRequest request = new AlarmTriggerRequest();
        request.setRuleId(UUID.randomUUID());
        request.setAlarmType(AlarmType.OVERLOAD);
        request.setSeverity(AlarmSeverity.WARNING);
        request.setDeviceId(UUID.randomUUID());
        request.setValue(new BigDecimal("3000"));
        request.setMessage("设备过载");

        AlarmRecord alarm = new AlarmRecord();
        alarm.setId(UUID.randomUUID());
        alarm.setAlarmNumber("ALM-20240101000001-0001");
        alarm.setAlarmType(AlarmType.OVERLOAD);

        when(alarmService.triggerAlarm(any(AlarmTriggerRequest.class))).thenReturn(alarm);

        mockMvc.perform(post("/api/alarms/trigger")
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
                .content(objectMapper.writeValueAsString(request)))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.alarmNumber").value("ALM-20240101000001-0001"));
    }

    @Test
    void testAcknowledgeAlarm_Success() throws Exception {
        UUID alarmId = UUID.randomUUID();
        UUID userId = UUID.randomUUID();

        AlarmRecord alarm = new AlarmRecord();
        alarm.setId(alarmId);
        alarm.setStatus(com.dormpower.model.AlarmStatus.ACKNOWLEDGED);

        when(alarmService.acknowledgeAlarm(alarmId, userId)).thenReturn(alarm);

        mockMvc.perform(post("/api/alarms/{id}/acknowledge", alarmId)
                .param("userId", userId.toString()))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.status").value("ACKNOWLEDGED"));
    }
}

import axios from 'axios';
import type { AlarmRecord, AlarmRule, AlarmTriggerRequest } from '@/types/alarm';

const API_BASE = '/api/alarms';

export const alarmApi = {
  // 触发告警
  async triggerAlarm(request: AlarmTriggerRequest): Promise<AlarmRecord> {
    const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/trigger`, request);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取告警列表
  async getAlarms(
    deviceId?: string,
    status?: string,
    startTime?: string,
    endTime?: string,
    page = 0,
    size = 20
  ) {
    const response = await axios.get(API_BASE, {
      params: { deviceId, status, startTime, endTime, page, size }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 确认告警
  async acknowledgeAlarm(alarmId: string, userId: string): Promise<AlarmRecord> {
    const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/${alarmId}/acknowledge`, null, {
      params: { userId }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 解决告警
  async resolveAlarm(
    alarmId: string,
    userId: string,
    note?: string
  ): Promise<AlarmRecord> {
    const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/${alarmId}/resolve`, null, {
      params: { userId, note }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取活动规则
  async getActiveRules(): Promise<AlarmRule[]> {
    const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/rules`);
    return response.data;
  }
};

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref, reactive, onMounted } from 'vue';
import { alarmApi } from '@/api/alarm';
import { deviceApi } from '@/api/device';
import type { AlarmRecord } from '@/types/alarm';
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus';

const devices = ref<any[]>([]);
const alarms = ref<AlarmRecord[]>([]);
const loading = ref(false);
const activeCount = ref(0);

const queryForm = reactive({
  deviceId: '',
  status: ''
});

const currentPage = ref(1);
const pageSize = ref(20);
const total = ref(0);

// 加载设备列表
const loadDevices = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await deviceApi.getDevices();
    devices.value = response.content || response;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to load devices:', error);
  }
};

// 加载告警列表
const loadAlarms = async () => {
  loading.value = true;
  try {
    const response = await alarmApi.getAlarms(
      queryForm.deviceId,
      queryForm.status,
      undefined,
      undefined,
      currentPage.value - 1,
      pageSize.value
    );

    alarms.value = response.content || [];
    total.value = response.totalElements || 0;

    // 统计活动告警
    activeCount.value = alarms.value.filter(a => a.status === 'ACTIVE').length;
  } catch (error: any) {
    ElMessage.error('加载告警失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
  } finally {
    loading.value = false;
  }
};

// 查询
const handleQuery = () => {
  currentPage.value = 1;
  loadAlarms();
};

// 确认告警
const handleAcknowledge = async (alarm: AlarmRecord) => {
  try {
    await ElMessageBox.confirm('确认该告警？', '告警确认');

    await alarmApi.acknowledgeAlarm(alarm.id, 'current-user-id');

    ElMessage.success('告警已确认');
    loadAlarms();
  } catch (error: any) {
    if (error !== 'cancel') {
      ElMessage.error('确认失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
    }
  }
};

// 解决告警
const handleResolve = async (alarm: AlarmRecord) => {
  try {
    const { value } = await ElMessageBox.prompt('请输入解决备注', '告警解决', {
      inputPattern: /.{5,}/,
      inputErrorMessage: '备注至少 5 个字符'
    });

    await alarmApi.resolveAlarm(alarm.id, 'current-user-id', value);

    ElMessage.success('告警已解决');
    loadAlarms();
  } catch (error: any) {
    if (error !== 'cancel') {
      ElMessage.error('解决失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
    }
  }
};

// 测试告警
const handleTestAlarm = async () => {
  try {
    await alarmApi.triggerAlarm({
      ruleId: 'test-rule-id',
      alarmType: 'OVERLOAD',
      severity: 'WARNING',
      message: '测试告警：设备过载',
      value: 3000
    });

    ElMessage.success('测试告警已触发');
    loadAlarms();
  } catch (error: any) {
    ElMessage.error('测试失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
  }
};

const handleViewDetail = (alarm: AlarmRecord) => {
  ElMessage.info('告警详情功能开发中...');
};

const getAlarmTypeText = (type: string) => {
  const texts: Record<string, string> = {
    OVERLOAD: '过载',
    DEVICE_OFFLINE: '离线'
  };
  return texts[type] || type;
};

const getSeverityType = (severity: string) => {
  const types: Record<string, any> = {
    INFO: 'info',
    WARNING: 'warning',
    CRITICAL: 'danger',
    EMERGENCY: 'danger'
  };
  return types[severity] || 'info';
};

const getSeverityText = (severity: string) => {
  const texts: Record<string, string> = {
    INFO: '提示',
    WARNING: '警告',
    CRITICAL: '严重',
    EMERGENCY: '紧急'
  };
  return texts[severity] || severity;
};

const getStatusType = (status: string) => {
  const types: Record<string, any> = {
    ACTIVE: 'danger',
    ACKNOWLEDGED: 'warning',
    RESOLVED: 'success'
  };
  return types[status] || 'info';
};

const getStatusText = (status: string) => {
  const texts: Record<string, string> = {
    ACTIVE: '活动中',
    ACKNOWLEDGED: '已确认',
    RESOLVED: '已解决'
  };
  return texts[status] || status;
};

onMounted(() => {
  loadDevices();
  loadAlarms();
});
</script>

docs.title: 问题 1：告警风暴
docs.text:
现象: 短时间内产生大量告警

解决方案:

// 告警抑制
public class AlarmSuppressor {
    private Map<String, LocalDateTime> lastAlarmTime = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
    private static final long SUPPRESS_WINDOW_MS = 300000; // 5 分钟

    public boolean shouldSuppress(String alarmKey) {
        LocalDateTime lastTime = lastAlarmTime.get(alarmKey);
        if (lastTime != null && 
            System.currentTimeMillis() - lastTime.atTime(java.time.LocalTime.now()).toInstant(
                java.time.ZoneOffset.UTC).toEpochMilli() < SUPPRESS_WINDOW_MS) {
            return true;
        }
        lastAlarmTime.put(alarmKey, LocalDateTime.now());
        return false;
    }
}

docs.title: 2.1 业务场景
docs.text:
场景 1：远程开关控制

用户点击开关 → 前端调用 API → 生成命令 → MQTT 下发 → 设备执行 → 返回 ACK → 更新状态

场景 2：批量控制

用户选择多个设备 → 批量下发命令 → 命令队列处理 → 逐个执行 → 统计结果

场景 3：定时任务

用户设置定时任务 → 保存任务 → 定时检查 → 到点触发 → 下发命令 → 执行控制

场景 4：场景联动

触发条件满足 → 执行场景规则 → 批量下发命令 → 多个设备联动

docs.title: 2.2 功能需求清单
docs.text: 功能 描述 优先级 远程控制 开关、参数设置 P0 命令下发 MQTT 命令推送 P0 命令确认 ACK 确认机制 P0 命令队列 异步命令处理 P1 批量控制 多设备同时控制 P1 定时任务 定时执行控制 P2 场景联动 规则触发控制 P2 命令历史 记录查询 P2

docs.title: 2.3 技术选型与理由
docs.text:
技术 说明 版本 选型理由 MQTT 命令下发协议 3.1.1 ✅ 双向通信：服务端发布命令，设备订阅并执行✅ QoS 保障：关键命令使用 QoS 1 确保到达✅ ACK 机制：设备执行后返回确认消息✅ 主题隔离：不同设备使用不同主题（dorm/cmd/{deviceId}） Command Pattern 命令模式 - ✅ 封装请求：将命令封装为对象，便于存储和追踪✅ 解耦调用者：发送者与接收者解耦✅ 支持撤销：可扩展支持命令撤销功能✅ 队列支持：命令可存入队列异步执行 Quartz 定时任务调度 2.x ✅ Cron 表达式：灵活的定时策略✅ 持久化：支持任务存储到数据库✅ 集群支持：支持分布式任务调度⚠️ 替代方案：教学场景用 Spring Scheduler 简化实现 Redis 命令队列缓存 7.x ✅ 高性能：内存存储，适合高频命令队列✅ List 结构：天然支持队列操作（LPUSH/RPOP）✅ 持久化：支持 RDB/AOF 持久化⚠️ 简化实现：教学场景直接用数据库存储命令

技术对比与取舍： - 同步 vs 异步：选择异步命令队列，避免设备离线导致请求超时 - Redis vs 数据库：高频场景用 Redis，低频场景用数据库简化架构 - Quartz vs Spring Scheduler：简单定时用 Spring Scheduler，复杂调度用 Quartz

docs.title: 1.1 创建 DeviceCommand 实体
docs.text:
文件位置: backend/src/main/java/com/dormpower/model/DeviceCommand.java

package com.dormpower.model;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.Data;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

@Data
@Entity
@Table(name = "device_command", indexes = {
    @Index(name = "idx_command_device_status", columnList = "deviceId, status"),
    @Index(name = "idx_command_created", columnList = "createdAt")
})
public class DeviceCommand {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(unique = true, nullable = false, length = 50)
    private String commandNumber; // 命令编号

    @Column(name = "device_id", nullable = false)
    private UUID deviceId;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private CommandType commandType;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    private Map<String, Object> parameters; // 命令参数

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private CommandStatus status = CommandStatus.PENDING;

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String mqttTopic; // MQTT 主题

    @Column(length = 1000)
    private String mqttPayload; // MQTT 消息体

    private Integer qos = 1; // MQTT QoS 级别

    private Integer timeoutSeconds = 30; // 超时时间

    private LocalDateTime sentAt; // 发送时间
    private LocalDateTime acknowledgedAt; // 确认时间
    private LocalDateTime executedAt; // 执行时间
    private LocalDateTime expiredAt; // 过期时间

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String errorMessage; // 错误信息

    private Integer retryCount = 0; // 重试次数

    @Column(name = "created_by")
    private UUID createdBy;

    private LocalDateTime createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();

    @PrePersist
    protected void onCreate() {
        if (commandNumber == null) {
            commandNumber = "CMD-" + LocalDateTime.now().format(
                java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyyMMddHHmmss")) +
                "-" + UUID.randomUUID().toString().substring(0, 4).toUpperCase();
        }
        if (expiredAt == null) {
            expiredAt = createdAt.plusMinutes(timeoutSeconds / 60);
        }
    }
}

enum CommandType {
    SWITCH_ON,          // 开
    SWITCH_OFF,         // 关
    RESTART,            // 重启
    SET_PARAMETER,      // 设置参数
    READ_STATUS,        // 读取状态
    FIRMWARE_UPDATE,    // 固件升级
    CUSTOM              // 自定义
}

enum CommandStatus {
    PENDING,      // 待发送
    SENT,         // 已发送
    ACKNOWLEDGED, // 已确认
    EXECUTED,     // 已执行
    FAILED,       // 失败
    TIMEOUT,      // 超时
    CANCELLED     // 已取消
}

package com.dormpower.service.impl;

import com.dormpower.dto.CommandRequest;
import com.dormpower.model.DeviceCommand;
import com.dormpower.model.CommandStatus;
import com.dormpower.model.CommandType;
import com.dormpower.repository.DeviceCommandRepository;
import com.dormpower.service.CommandService;
import com.dormpower.mqtt.MqttBridge;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;

import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
import java.util.UUID;

@Slf4j
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class CommandServiceImpl implements CommandService {

    private final DeviceCommandRepository commandRepository;
    private final MqttBridge mqttBridge;
    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public DeviceCommand sendCommand(CommandRequest request) {
        DeviceCommand command = new DeviceCommand();
        command.setDeviceId(request.getDeviceId());
        command.setCommandType(request.getCommandType());
        command.setParameters(request.getParameters());
        command.setQos(request.getQos() != null ? request.getQos() : 1);
        command.setTimeoutSeconds(request.getTimeoutSeconds() != null ? request.getTimeoutSeconds() : 30);

        // 构建 MQTT 消息
        String topic = "dorm/cmd/" + request.getDeviceId();
        command.setMqttTopic(topic);

        try {
            String payload = objectMapper.writeValueAsString(Map.of(
                "commandId", command.getCommandNumber(),
                "type", request.getCommandType().name(),
                "parameters", request.getParameters(),
                "timestamp", System.currentTimeMillis()
            ));
            command.setMqttPayload(payload);

            // 保存命令
            commandRepository.save(command);

            // 发送 MQTT 消息
            mqttBridge.publish(topic, payload, command.getQos());

            command.setStatus(CommandStatus.SENT);
            command.setSentAt(LocalDateTime.now());

            log.info("命令已发送：{}", command.getCommandNumber());
            return command;

        } catch (Exception e) {
            command.setStatus(CommandStatus.FAILED);
            command.setErrorMessage("发送失败：" + e.getMessage());
            log.error("命令发送失败：{}", command.getCommandNumber(), e);
            return commandRepository.save(command);
        }
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public DeviceCommand acknowledgeCommand(String commandNumber, boolean success) {
        DeviceCommand command = commandRepository.findByCommandNumber(commandNumber)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("命令不存在"));

        if (success) {
            command.setStatus(CommandStatus.ACKNOWLEDGED);
            command.setAcknowledgedAt(LocalDateTime.now());
        } else {
            command.setStatus(CommandStatus.FAILED);
            command.setErrorMessage("设备执行失败");
        }

        return commandRepository.save(command);
    }

    @Override
    public Page<DeviceCommand> getCommands(UUID deviceId, Pageable pageable) {
        return commandRepository.findByDeviceId(deviceId, pageable);
    }

    @Override
    public Optional<DeviceCommand> getCommand(String commandNumber) {
        return commandRepository.findByCommandNumber(commandNumber);
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public void retryCommand(UUID commandId) {
        DeviceCommand command = commandRepository.findById(commandId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("命令不存在"));

        if (command.getRetryCount() >= 3) {
            throw new RuntimeException("已达到最大重试次数");
        }

        command.setRetryCount(command.getRetryCount() + 1);
        command.setStatus(CommandStatus.PENDING);
        command.setErrorMessage(null);

        // 重新发送
        mqttBridge.publish(command.getMqttTopic(), command.getMqttPayload(), command.getQos());
        command.setStatus(CommandStatus.SENT);
        command.setSentAt(LocalDateTime.now());

        commandRepository.save(command);
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public void cancelCommand(UUID commandId) {
        DeviceCommand command = commandRepository.findById(commandId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("命令不存在"));

        if (command.getStatus() == CommandStatus.SENT || 
            command.getStatus() == CommandStatus.PENDING) {
            command.setStatus(CommandStatus.CANCELLED);
            commandRepository.save(command);
        } else {
            throw new RuntimeException("命令状态不允许取消");
        }
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public List<DeviceCommand> sendBatchCommands(List<CommandRequest> requests) {
        return requests.stream()
            .map(this::sendCommand)
            .toList();
    }
}

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.dto.CommandRequest;
import com.dormpower.model.DeviceCommand;
import com.dormpower.service.CommandService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/commands")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class CommandController {

    private final CommandService commandService;

    @PostMapping
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('device:control', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<DeviceCommand> sendCommand(@RequestBody CommandRequest request) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(commandService.sendCommand(request));
    }

    @PostMapping("/batch")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('device:control', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<List<DeviceCommand>> sendBatchCommands(
        @RequestBody List<CommandRequest> requests
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(commandService.sendBatchCommands(requests));
    }

    @GetMapping("/{commandNumber}")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('device:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<DeviceCommand> getCommand(@PathVariable String commandNumber) {
        return commandService.getCommand(commandNumber)
            .map(ResponseEntity::ok)
            .orElse(ResponseEntity.notFound().build());
    }

    @GetMapping("/device/{deviceId}")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('device:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Page<DeviceCommand>> getDeviceCommands(
        @PathVariable UUID deviceId,
        Pageable pageable
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(commandService.getCommands(deviceId, pageable));
    }

    @PostMapping("/{id}/acknowledge")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('device:control', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<DeviceCommand> acknowledgeCommand(
        @PathVariable UUID id,
        @RequestParam boolean success
    ) {
        DeviceCommand command = commandRepository.findById(id)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("命令不存在"));
        return ResponseEntity.ok(commandService.acknowledgeCommand(command.getCommandNumber(), success));
    }

    @PostMapping("/{id}/retry")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('device:control', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Void> retryCommand(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        commandService.retryCommand(id);
        return ResponseEntity.ok().build();
    }

    @PostMapping("/{id}/cancel")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('device:control', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Void> cancelCommand(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        commandService.cancelCommand(id);
        return ResponseEntity.ok().build();
    }
}

@WebMvcTest(CommandController.class)
class CommandControllerTest {

    @Autowired
    private MockMvc mockMvc;

    @MockBean
    private CommandService commandService;

    @Autowired
    private ObjectMapper objectMapper;

    @Test
    void testSendCommand_Success() throws Exception {
        CommandRequest request = new CommandRequest();
        request.setDeviceId(UUID.randomUUID());
        request.setCommandType(CommandType.SWITCH_ON);
        request.setParameters(Map.of("delay", 0));

        DeviceCommand command = new DeviceCommand();
        command.setCommandNumber("CMD-20240101000001-0001");
        command.setStatus(CommandStatus.SENT);

        when(commandService.sendCommand(any(CommandRequest.class))).thenReturn(command);

        mockMvc.perform(post("/api/commands")
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
                .content(objectMapper.writeValueAsString(request)))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.commandNumber").value("CMD-20240101000001-0001"))
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.status").value("SENT"));
    }
}

import axios from 'axios';
import type { DeviceCommand, CommandRequest, ScheduledTask } from '@/types/command';

const API_BASE = '/api/commands';

export const commandApi = {
  // 发送命令
  async sendCommand(request: CommandRequest): Promise<DeviceCommand> {
    const response = await axios.post(API_BASE, request);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 批量发送命令
  async sendBatchCommands(requests: CommandRequest[]): Promise<DeviceCommand[]> {
    const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/batch`, requests);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取命令详情
  async getCommand(commandNumber: string): Promise<DeviceCommand> {
    const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/${commandNumber}`);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取设备命令列表
  async getDeviceCommands(deviceId: string, page = 0, size = 20) {
    const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/device/${deviceId}`, {
      params: { page, size }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 确认命令
  async acknowledgeCommand(commandId: string, success: boolean): Promise<DeviceCommand> {
    const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/${commandId}/acknowledge`, null, {
      params: { success }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 重试命令
  async retryCommand(commandId: string) {
    await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/${commandId}/retry`);
  },

  // 取消命令
  async cancelCommand(commandId: string) {
    await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/${commandId}/cancel`);
  }
};

// 定时任务 API
const TASK_API_BASE = '/api/scheduled-tasks';

export const taskApi = {
  // 获取任务列表
  async getTasks(enabled?: boolean) {
    const response = await axios.get(TASK_API_BASE, { params: { enabled } });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 创建任务
  async createTask(task: Partial<ScheduledTask>) {
    const response = await axios.post(TASK_API_BASE, task);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 更新任务
  async updateTask(taskId: string, task: Partial<ScheduledTask>) {
    const response = await axios.put(`${TASK_API_BASE}/${taskId}`, task);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 删除任务
  async deleteTask(taskId: string) {
    await axios.delete(`${TASK_API_BASE}/${taskId}`);
  },

  // 启用/禁用任务
  async toggleTask(taskId: string, enabled: boolean) {
    const response = await axios.patch(`${TASK_API_BASE}/${taskId}/toggle`, { enabled });
    return response.data;
  }
};

          </el-table>
        </el-card>
      </el-col>

      <!-- 控制面板 -->

        <el-card v-if="selectedDevice">
          <template #header>
            <span>控制面板 - {{ selectedDevice.name }}</span>
          </template>

          <el-form label-width="100px">
            <el-form-item label="开关控制">
              <el-switch
                v-model="deviceStatus"
                active-text="开"
                inactive-text="关"
                :disabled="selectedDevice.status !== 'ONLINE'"
                @change="handleSwitchChange"
              />
            </el-form-item>

            <el-form-item label="重启设备">
              <el-button 
                type="warning" 
                @click="handleRestart"
                :disabled="selectedDevice.status !== 'ONLINE'"
              >
                重启
              </el-button>
            </el-form-item>

            <el-form-item label="命令历史">

            </el-form-item>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref, computed, onMounted } from 'vue';
import { deviceApi } from '@/api/device';
import { commandApi } from '@/api/command';
import type { DeviceCommand } from '@/types/command';
import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus';

const devices = ref<any[]>([]);
const searchText = ref('');
const selectedDevice = ref<any>(null);
const deviceStatus = ref(false);
const historyVisible = ref(false);
const commandHistory = ref<DeviceCommand[]>([]);

const filteredDevices = computed(() => {
  if (!searchText.value) return devices.value;
  return devices.value.filter(d => 
    d.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchText.value.toLowerCase())
  );
});

// 加载设备列表
const loadDevices = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await deviceApi.getDevices();
    devices.value = response.content || response;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to load devices:', error);
  }
};

// 选择设备
const handleDeviceSelect = (device: any) => {
  selectedDevice.value = device;
  deviceStatus.value = device.status === 'ONLINE';
  loadCommandHistory(device.id);
};

// 开关控制
const handleSwitchChange = async (value: boolean) => {
  if (!selectedDevice.value) return;

  try {
    await commandApi.sendCommand({
      deviceId: selectedDevice.value.id,
      commandType: value ? 'SWITCH_ON' : 'SWITCH_OFF',
      parameters: {}
    });

    ElMessage.success('命令已发送');
  } catch (error: any) {
    ElMessage.error('发送失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
  }
};

// 重启设备
const handleRestart = async () => {
  if (!selectedDevice.value) return;

  try {
    await commandApi.sendCommand({
      deviceId: selectedDevice.value.id,
      commandType: 'RESTART',
      parameters: {}
    });

    ElMessage.success('重启命令已发送');
  } catch (error: any) {
    ElMessage.error('发送失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
  }
};

// 加载命令历史
const loadCommandHistory = async (deviceId: string) => {
  try {
    const response = await commandApi.getDeviceCommands(deviceId);
    commandHistory.value = response.content || [];
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to load command history:', error);
  }
};

// 显示命令历史
const showCommandHistory = () => {
  historyVisible.value = true;
};

const getStatusType = (status: string) => {
  const types: Record<string, any> = {
    SENT: 'primary',
    ACKNOWLEDGED: 'success',
    EXECUTED: 'success',
    FAILED: 'danger',
    TIMEOUT: 'warning'
  };
  return types[status] || 'info';
};

const getStatusText = (status: string) => {
  const texts: Record<string, string> = {
    SENT: '已发送',
    ACKNOWLEDGED: '已确认',
    EXECUTED: '已执行',
    FAILED: '失败',
    TIMEOUT: '超时'
  };
  return texts[status] || status;
};

onMounted(() => {
  loadDevices();
});
</script>

  padding: 20px;
}
</style>

docs.title: 问题 1：命令超时
docs.text:
现象: 设备未及时响应

解决方案:

// 定时检查超时命令
@Scheduled(fixedRate = 60000) // 每分钟检查
public void checkTimeoutCommands() {
    List<DeviceCommand> timeoutCommands = commandRepository
        .findByStatusAndExpiredAtBefore(CommandStatus.SENT, LocalDateTime.now());

    for (DeviceCommand command : timeoutCommands) {
        command.setStatus(CommandStatus.TIMEOUT);
        command.setErrorMessage("命令超时");
        commandRepository.save(command);
    }
}

docs.title: 2.1 业务场景
docs.text:
场景 1：楼栋管理

创建楼栋 → 设置楼层数 → 设置房间数 → 楼栋信息维护

场景 2：房间管理

创建房间 → 设置床位 → 分配设备 → 房间信息维护

场景 3：入住管理

学生申请 → 管理员审核 → 分配房间 → 办理入住 → 设备绑定

场景 4：退宿管理

学生申请 → 管理员审核 → 检查设备 → 办理退宿 → 清理数据

docs.title: 2.3 技术选型与理由
docs.text:
技术 说明 版本 选型理由 JPA/Hibernate ORM 框架 3.2.x ✅ 级联操作：楼栋 - 房间 - 学生层级关系自动管理✅ 查询简化：Spring Data JPA 方法命名查询✅ 事务管理：@Transactional 保证数据一致性 Spring Data REST RESTful API 3.2.x ✅ 快速开发：Repository 自动暴露为 REST API✅ HATEOAS：支持资源关联链接⚠️ 简化实现：教学场景手动编写 Controller 更清晰 Vue Element Plus UI 组件库 2.x ✅ 表格组件：ElTable 支持分页、排序、筛选✅ 表单组件：ElForm 支持验证、布局✅ 对话框：ElDialog 实现弹窗编辑 EasyExcel Excel 导入导出 3.x ✅ 批量导入：支持 Excel 批量导入学生信息✅ 模板导出：导出宿舍分配报表✅ 流式处理：避免大数据量 OOM

技术对比与取舍： - 单表 vs 层级设计：选择楼栋 - 房间两层设计，符合实际业务场景 - 手动 SQL vs JPA：选择 JPA 因为 CRUD 操作多，查询逻辑简单 - 前端分页 vs 后端分页：选择后端分页，减少前端压力，适合大数据量

// Building.java
package com.dormpower.model;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.Data;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.UUID;

@Data
@Entity
@Table(name = "building")
public class Building {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(nullable = false, length = 100)
    private String name;

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String address;

    private Integer floors; // 楼层数

    private Integer totalRooms; // 房间总数

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String description;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    private boolean enabled = true;

    private LocalDateTime createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    private LocalDateTime updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();

    @PreUpdate
    protected void onUpdate() {
        updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    }
}

// Room.java
package com.dormpower.model;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.Data;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.UUID;

@Data
@Entity
@Table(name = "room", indexes = {
    @Index(name = "idx_room_building", columnList = "building_id"),
    @Index(name = "idx_room_number", columnList = "room_number")
})
public class Room {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(name = "room_number", nullable = false, length = 50)
    private String roomNumber;

    @Column(name = "building_id", nullable = false)
    private UUID buildingId;

    private Integer floor; // 楼层

    private Integer maxOccupancy = 4; // 最大入住人数

    private Integer currentOccupancy = 0; // 当前入住人数

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    private RoomStatus status = RoomStatus.VACANT;

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String description;

    private LocalDateTime createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    private LocalDateTime updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();

    @PreUpdate
    protected void onUpdate() {
        updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    }
}

enum RoomStatus {
    VACANT,     // 空置
    OCCUPIED,   // 已入住
    MAINTENANCE // 维修中
}

@Repository
public interface RoomRepository extends JpaRepository<Room, UUID> {

    List<Room> findByBuildingId(UUID buildingId);

}

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.dto.RoomDTO;
import com.dormpower.model.Room;
import com.dormpower.service.RoomService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/rooms")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class RoomController {

    private final RoomService roomService;

    @PostMapping
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('room:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Room> createRoom(@RequestBody RoomDTO dto) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(roomService.createRoom(dto));
    }

    @GetMapping
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('room:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Page<Room>> getRooms(
        @RequestParam(required = false) UUID buildingId,
        Pageable pageable
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(roomService.getRooms(buildingId, pageable));
    }

    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('room:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Room> getRoom(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        return roomService.getRoom(id)
            .map(ResponseEntity::ok)
            .orElse(ResponseEntity.notFound().build());
    }

    @PutMapping("/{id}")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('room:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Room> updateRoom(
        @PathVariable UUID id,
        @RequestBody RoomDTO dto
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(roomService.updateRoom(id, dto));
    }

    @DeleteMapping("/{id}")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('room:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Void> deleteRoom(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        roomService.deleteRoom(id);
        return ResponseEntity.noContent().build();
    }

    @PostMapping("/{id}/checkin")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('room:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Room> checkIn(
        @PathVariable UUID id,
        @RequestParam UUID userId
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(roomService.checkIn(id, userId));
    }

    @PostMapping("/{id}/checkout")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('room:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Room> checkOut(
        @PathVariable UUID id,
        @RequestParam UUID userId
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(roomService.checkOut(id, userId));
    }
}

import axios from 'axios';
import type { Room, Building, ResidenceRecord } from '@/types/room';

const ROOM_API_BASE = '/api/rooms';
const BUILDING_API_BASE = '/api/buildings';

export const roomApi = {
  async getRooms(buildingId?: string, page = 0, size = 20) {
    const response = await axios.get(ROOM_API_BASE, {
      params: { buildingId, page, size }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  async createRoom(room: Partial<Room>) {
    const response = await axios.post(ROOM_API_BASE, room);
    return response.data;
  },

  async updateRoom(roomId: string, room: Partial<Room>) {
    const response = await axios.put(`${ROOM_API_BASE}/${roomId}`, room);
    return response.data;
  },

  async deleteRoom(roomId: string) {
    await axios.delete(`${ROOM_API_BASE}/${roomId}`);
  },

  async checkIn(roomId: string, userId: string) {
    const response = await axios.post(`${ROOM_API_BASE}/${roomId}/checkin`, null, {
      params: { userId }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  async checkOut(roomId: string, userId: string) {
    const response = await axios.post(`${ROOM_API_BASE}/${roomId}/checkout`, null, {
      params: { userId }
    });
    return response.data;
  }
};

export const buildingApi = {
  async getBuildings() {
    const response = await axios.get(BUILDING_API_BASE);
    return response.data;
  },

  async createBuilding(building: Partial<Building>) {
    const response = await axios.post(BUILDING_API_BASE, building);
    return response.data;
  }
};

docs.title: 2.3 技术选型与理由
docs.text:
技术 说明 版本 选型理由 Spring AOP 面向切面编程 3.2.x ✅ 审计日志：通过切面自动记录操作日志✅ 解耦业务：日志逻辑与业务逻辑分离✅ 注解驱动：@AuditLog 自定义注解标记需要审计的方法✅ 性能监控：可记录方法执行时间，分析性能瓶颈 Caffeine 本地缓存 3.x ✅ 高性能：基于 Window-TinyLfu 算法，命中率高于 Guava✅ 内存安全：支持基于大小、时间、引用强度淘汰✅ Spring 集成：@Cacheable 注解简化缓存配置⚠️ 局限性：单机缓存，分布式场景需用 Redis Thymeleaf 模板引擎 3.x ✅ 日志查看：服务端渲染日志页面✅ Spring 集成：与 Spring MVC 无缝集成⚠️ 替代方案：前后端分离架构中，更多使用 Vue/React Logback 日志框架 1.4.x ✅ Spring 默认：Spring Boot 默认日志框架✅ 配置灵活：支持 XML/Groovy 配置✅ 异步日志：AsyncAppender 提升性能✅ 滚动策略：支持按时间/大小滚动日志文件

技术对比与取舍： - AOP vs 手动日志：选择 AOP 因为日志是横切关注点，适合切面处理 - 本地缓存 vs Redis：简单配置用 Caffeine，共享数据用 Redis - Logback vs Log4j2：选择 Logback 因为 Spring Boot 默认支持，配置简单

docs.title: 4.1 创建 SystemConfigController
docs.text:
文件位置: backend/src/main/java/com/dormpower/controller/SystemConfigController.java

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.model.SystemConfig;
import com.dormpower.service.SystemConfigService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/system-configs")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class SystemConfigController {

    private final SystemConfigService systemConfigService;

    @GetMapping
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('system:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<List<SystemConfig>> getConfigs(
        @RequestParam(required = false) String category
    ) {
        if (category != null) {
            return ResponseEntity.ok(systemConfigService.getConfigsByCategory(category));
        }
        return ResponseEntity.ok((List) systemConfigService.getAllConfigs().entrySet().stream()
            .map(e -> {
                SystemConfig config = new SystemConfig();
                config.setConfigKey(e.getKey());
                config.setConfigValue(e.getValue());
                return config;
            }).toList());
    }

    @GetMapping("/{key}")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('system:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<SystemConfig> getConfig(@PathVariable String key) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(systemConfigService.getConfig(key));
    }

    @PutMapping("/{key}")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('system:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<SystemConfig> updateConfig(
        @PathVariable String key,
        @RequestBody Map<String, String> body
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(
            systemConfigService.setConfig(key, body.get("value"), body.get("category"))
        );
    }
}

文件位置: frontend/src/api/system.ts

import axios from 'axios';
import type { SystemConfig, AuditLog } from '@/types/system';

const CONFIG_API_BASE = '/api/system-configs';
const AUDIT_API_BASE = '/api/audit-logs';

export const systemApi = {
  async getConfigs(category?: string): Promise<SystemConfig[]> {
    const response = await axios.get(CONFIG_API_BASE, {
      params: { category }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  async updateConfig(key: string, value: string, category?: string) {
    const response = await axios.put(`${CONFIG_API_BASE}/${key}`, {
      value,
      category
    });
    return response.data;
  }
};

export const auditApi = {
  async getAuditLogs(
    userId?: string,
    action?: string,
    startTime?: string,
    endTime?: string,
    page = 0,
    size = 20
  ) {
    const response = await axios.get(AUDIT_API_BASE, {
      params: { userId, action, startTime, endTime, page, size }
    });
    return response.data;
  }
};

package com.dormpower.model;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.Data;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.UUID;

@Data
@Entity
@Table(name = "ai_report")
public class AIReport {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(name = "room_id", nullable = false)
    private UUID roomId;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private ReportType reportType = ReportType.MONTHLY;

    @Column(nullable = false, length = 20)
    private String reportPeriod; // 如 2024-01

    @Column(columnDefinition = "TEXT")
    private String reportContent; // JSON 格式报告内容

    @Column(length = 2000)
    private String summary; // 报告摘要

    @Column(precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private java.math.BigDecimal totalElectricity; // 总用电量

    @Column(precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private java.math.BigDecimal totalCost; // 总电费

    @Column(precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private java.math.BigDecimal predictedNext; // 预测下期

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.model.AIReport;
import com.dormpower.service.AIReportService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/ai-reports")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class AIReportController {

    private final AIReportService aiReportService;

    @PostMapping("/generate")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('ai:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<AIReport> generateReport(
        @RequestParam UUID roomId,
        @RequestParam String period
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(aiReportService.generateReport(roomId, period));
    }

    @GetMapping
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('ai:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<AIReport> getReport(
        @RequestParam UUID roomId,
        @RequestParam String period
    ) {
        return aiReportService.getReport(roomId, period)
            .map(ResponseEntity::ok)
            .orElse(ResponseEntity.notFound().build());
    }

    @GetMapping("/history")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('ai:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<List<AIReport>> getReportHistory(@RequestParam UUID roomId) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(aiReportService.getReportHistory(roomId));
    }

    @GetMapping("/suggestion")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('ai:read', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<String> getSuggestion(@RequestParam UUID roomId) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(aiReportService.getEnergySavingSuggestion(roomId));
    }
}

import axios from 'axios';
import type { AIReport, ChatMessage, ChatRequest } from '@/types/ai';

const REPORT_API_BASE = '/api/ai-reports';
const CHAT_API_BASE = '/api/ai/chat';

export const aiReportApi = {
  async generateReport(roomId: string, period: string): Promise<AIReport> {
    const response = await axios.post(`${REPORT_API_BASE}/generate`, null, {
      params: { roomId, period }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  async getReport(roomId: string, period: string): Promise<AIReport> {
    const response = await axios.get(REPORT_API_BASE, {
      params: { roomId, period }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  async getReportHistory(roomId: string): Promise<AIReport[]> {
    const response = await axios.get(`${REPORT_API_BASE}/history`, {
      params: { roomId }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  async getSuggestion(roomId: string): Promise<string> {
    const response = await axios.get(`${REPORT_API_BASE}/suggestion`, {
      params: { roomId }
    });
    return response.data;
  }
};

export const aiChatApi = {
  async sendMessage(request: ChatRequest): Promise<ChatMessage> {
    const response = await axios.post(CHAT_API_BASE, request);
    return response.data;
  }
};

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue';
import { aiReportApi } from '@/api/ai';
import type { AIReport } from '@/types/ai';
import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus';

const report = ref<AIReport | null>(null);

const loadReport = async () => {
  try {
    // TODO: 传入实际的 roomId 和 period
    const result = await aiReportApi.getReport('room-id', '2024-01');
    report.value = result;
  } catch (error) {
    console.log('No report found');
  }
};

const handleGenerate = async () => {
  try {
    report.value = await aiReportApi.generateReport('room-id', '2024-01');
    ElMessage.success('报告生成成功');
  } catch (error: any) {
    ElMessage.error('生成失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
  }
};

const getScoreType = (score?: number) => {
  if (!score) return 'info';
  if (score >= 90) return 'success';
  if (score >= 70) return 'warning';
  return 'danger';
};

onMounted(() => {
  loadReport();
});
</script>

docs.title: 2.1 业务场景
docs.text:
场景 1：站内信通知

系统生成通知 → 保存到数据库 → WebSocket 推送 → 用户接收

场景 2：邮件通知

触发邮件通知 → 加载模板 → 填充数据 → 发送邮件 → 记录发送结果

场景 3：短信通知

触发短信通知 → 加载模板 → 调用短信 API → 发送短信 → 记录结果

场景 4：通知设置

用户设置通知偏好 → 保存设置 → 发送通知时检查偏好

docs.title: 2.2 功能需求清单
docs.text: 功能 描述 优先级 站内信 系统内消息通知 P0 邮件通知 邮件发送 P1 短信通知 短信发送 P1 通知模板 模板管理 P1 通知历史 发送记录 P2 用户设置 通知偏好 P2

docs.title: 2.3 技术选型与理由
docs.text:
技术 说明 版本 选型理由 Spring Boot Mail 邮件发送 3.2.x ✅ 简化配置：Spring Boot 自动配置 JavaMail✅ 模板支持：集成 Thymeleaf 发送 HTML 邮件✅ 附件支持：支持发送带附件的邮件✅ 异步发送：@Async 异步发送邮件，避免阻塞 Thymeleaf 模板引擎 3.x ✅ 邮件模板：HTML 模板渲染邮件内容✅ 变量替换：${username} 等变量动态替换✅ 条件渲染：根据通知类型渲染不同内容✅ 布局支持：支持模板继承，统一邮件风格 WebSocket 实时推送 - ✅ 站内信：实时推送站内消息✅ 多端同步：多个客户端同时接收通知✅ 在线状态：可检测用户在线状态，离线时发送邮件/短信✅ 双向通信：用户已读回执可实时回传 阿里云短信 短信服务 - ✅ 到达率高：国内到达率 99%+✅ 模板管理：支持短信模板审核和管理✅ 签名支持：支持自定义短信签名⚠️ 成本控制：短信按条收费，适合重要通知

技术对比与取舍： - 邮件 vs 短信：邮件成本低但到达率稍低，短信到达率高但成本高，根据场景选择 - 推送 vs 拉取：选择 WebSocket 推送，实时性更好，用户体验更优 - 模板化 vs 硬编码：选择模板化便于维护和国际化

package com.dormpower.model;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.Data;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.UUID;

@Data
@Entity
@Table(name = "notification", indexes = {
    @Index(name = "idx_notification_user", columnList = "userId, status"),
    @Index(name = "idx_notification_type", columnList = "type")
})
public class Notification {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(name = "user_id", nullable = false)
    private UUID userId;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private NotificationType type;

    @Column(nullable = false, length = 200)
    private String title;

    @Column(columnDefinition = "TEXT", nullable = false)
    private String content;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private NotificationStatus status = NotificationStatus.UNREAD;

    private Integer priority = 0; // 优先级 0-10

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String actionUrl; // 关联操作链接

    @Column(name = "related_type")
    private String relatedType; // 关联类型（BILL, ALARM 等）

    @Column(name = "related_id")
    private UUID relatedId; // 关联 ID

    private LocalDateTime readAt; // 阅读时间
    private LocalDateTime sentAt; // 发送时间

    @Column(length = 500)
    private String errorMessage; // 发送错误信息

    private LocalDateTime createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();

    @PrePersist
    protected void onCreate() {
        if (sentAt == null && status == NotificationStatus.SENT) {
            sentAt = LocalDateTime.now();
        }
    }
}

enum NotificationType {
    SYSTEM,         // 系统通知
    BILL,           // 账单通知
    ALARM,          // 告警通知
    DEVICE,         // 设备通知
    ANNOUNCEMENT    // 公告
}

enum NotificationStatus {
    DRAFT,      // 草稿
    PENDING,    // 待发送
    SENT,       // 已发送
    READ,       // 已读
    FAILED      // 发送失败
}

package com.dormpower.service.impl;

import com.dormpower.dto.NotificationRequest;
import com.dormpower.model.Notification;
import com.dormpower.model.NotificationStatus;
import com.dormpower.repository.NotificationRepository;
import com.dormpower.service.NotificationService;
import com.dormpower.websocket.WebSocketManager;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
import org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Async;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;

import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

@Slf4j
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class NotificationServiceImpl implements NotificationService {

    private final NotificationRepository notificationRepository;
    private final WebSocketManager webSocketManager;

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public Notification sendNotification(NotificationRequest request) {
        Notification notification = new Notification();
        notification.setUserId(request.getUserId());
        notification.setType(request.getType());
        notification.setTitle(request.getTitle());
        notification.setContent(request.getContent());
        notification.setPriority(request.getPriority() != null ? request.getPriority() : 0);
        notification.setActionUrl(request.getActionUrl());
        notification.setRelatedType(request.getRelatedType());
        notification.setRelatedId(request.getRelatedId());
        notification.setStatus(NotificationStatus.SENT);
        notification.setSentAt(LocalDateTime.now());

        Notification saved = notificationRepository.save(notification);

        // 通过 WebSocket 推送
        webSocketManager.sendNotification(saved);

        log.info("通知已发送：{} to user {}", saved.getId(), saved.getUserId());
        return saved;
    }

    @Override
    @Async
    public void sendBulkNotification(List<UUID> userIds, NotificationRequest request) {
        for (UUID userId : userIds) {
            try {
                request.setUserId(userId);
                sendNotification(request);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("发送通知给失败 userId: {}", userId, e);
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public Page<Notification> getUserNotifications(UUID userId, Pageable pageable) {
        return notificationRepository.findByUserId(userId, pageable);
    }

    @Override
    public Long getUnreadCount(UUID userId) {
        return notificationRepository.countUnreadByUserId(userId);
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public void markAsRead(UUID notificationId) {
        Notification notification = notificationRepository.findById(notificationId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("通知不存在"));

        notification.setStatus(NotificationStatus.READ);
        notification.setReadAt(LocalDateTime.now());
        notificationRepository.save(notification);
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public void markAllAsRead(UUID userId) {
        List<Notification> notifications = notificationRepository
            .findByUserIdAndStatus(userId, NotificationStatus.UNREAD);

        for (Notification notification : notifications) {
            notification.setStatus(NotificationStatus.READ);
            notification.setReadAt(LocalDateTime.now());
        }
        notificationRepository.saveAll(notifications);
    }

    @Override
    @Transactional
    public void deleteNotification(UUID notificationId) {
        notificationRepository.deleteById(notificationId);
    }
}

docs.title: 4.1 创建 NotificationController
docs.text:
文件位置: backend/src/main/java/com/dormpower/controller/NotificationController.java

package com.dormpower.controller;

import com.dormpower.dto.NotificationRequest;
import com.dormpower.model.Notification;
import com.dormpower.service.NotificationService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;
import org.springframework.security.core.annotation.AuthenticationPrincipal;
import org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/notifications")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class NotificationController {

    private final NotificationService notificationService;

    @GetMapping
    @PreAuthorize("isAuthenticated()")
    public ResponseEntity<Page<Notification>> getMyNotifications(
        @AuthenticationPrincipal UserDetails userDetails,
        Pageable pageable
    ) {
        // TODO: 从用户名获取用户 ID
        UUID userId = UUID.fromString(userDetails.getUsername());
        return ResponseEntity.ok(
            notificationService.getUserNotifications(userId, pageable)
        );
    }

    @GetMapping("/unread-count")
    @PreAuthorize("isAuthenticated()")
    public ResponseEntity<Long> getUnreadCount(
        @AuthenticationPrincipal UserDetails userDetails
    ) {
        UUID userId = UUID.fromString(userDetails.getUsername());
        return ResponseEntity.ok(notificationService.getUnreadCount(userId));
    }

    @PostMapping("/{id}/read")
    @PreAuthorize("isAuthenticated()")
    public ResponseEntity<Void> markAsRead(
        @PathVariable UUID id,
        @AuthenticationPrincipal UserDetails userDetails
    ) {
        notificationService.markAsRead(id);
        return ResponseEntity.ok().build();
    }

    @PostMapping("/read-all")
    @PreAuthorize("isAuthenticated()")
    public ResponseEntity<Void> markAllAsRead(
        @AuthenticationPrincipal UserDetails userDetails
    ) {
        UUID userId = UUID.fromString(userDetails.getUsername());
        notificationService.markAllAsRead(userId);
        return ResponseEntity.ok().build();
    }

    @DeleteMapping("/{id}")
    @PreAuthorize("isAuthenticated()")
    public ResponseEntity<Void> deleteNotification(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        notificationService.deleteNotification(id);
        return ResponseEntity.noContent().build();
    }

    @PostMapping("/send")
    @PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('notification:write', 'admin')")
    public ResponseEntity<Notification> sendNotification(
        @RequestBody NotificationRequest request
    ) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(notificationService.sendNotification(request));
    }
}

docs.text:
文件位置: frontend/src/api/notification.ts

import axios from 'axios';
import type { Notification, NotificationRequest } from '@/types/notification';

const API_BASE = '/api/notifications';

export const notificationApi = {
  // 获取通知列表
  async getNotifications(page = 0, size = 20) {
    const response = await axios.get(API_BASE, {
      params: { page, size }
    });
    return response.data;
  },

  // 获取未读数量
  async getUnreadCount(): Promise<number> {
    const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/unread-count`);
    return response.data;
  },

  // 标记为已读
  async markAsRead(notificationId: string) {
    await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/${notificationId}/read`);
  },

  // 全部标记为已读
  async markAllAsRead() {
    await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/read-all`);
  },

  // 删除通知
  async deleteNotification(notificationId: string) {
    await axios.delete(`${API_BASE}/${notificationId}`);
  },

  // 发送通知
  async sendNotification(request: NotificationRequest): Promise<Notification> {
    const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE}/send`, request);
    return response.data;
  }
};

<template>
  <div class="notification-center">
    <el-card>
      <template #header>
        <span>消息中心</span>
        <el-button 
          type="primary" 
          size="small"
          @click="handleMarkAllRead"
        >
          全部已读
        </el-button>
      </template>

      <el-tabs v-model="activeTab">
        <el-tab-pane label="全部消息" name="all">
          <el-badge :value="unreadCount" class="tab-badge">
            <span>消息列表</span>
          </el-badge>
        </el-tab-pane>
        <el-tab-pane label="未读" name="unread">
          <el-badge :value="unreadCount" class="tab-badge">
            <span>未读消息</span>
          </el-badge>
        </el-tab-pane>
      </el-tabs>

      <el-list :data="notifications" class="notification-list">
        <el-list-item
          v-for="item in notifications"
          :key="item.id"
          :class="{ 'unread-item': item.status === 'UNREAD' }"
        >
          <template #default>
            <div class="notification-item" @click="handleRead(item)">
              <div class="notification-header">
                <el-tag :type="getTypeType(item.type)" size="small">
                  {{ getTypeText(item.type) }}
                </el-tag>
                <span class="notification-time">{{ formatTime(item.createdAt) }}</span>
              </div>
              <div class="notification-title">{{ item.title }}</div>
              <div class="notification-content">{{ item.content }}</div>
            </div>
            <template #extra>
              <el-button 
                v-if="item.status === 'UNREAD'" 
                size="small" 
                @click="handleMarkRead(item.id)"
              >
                标记已读
              </el-button>
              <el-button size="small" @click="handleDelete(item.id)">删除</el-button>
            </template>
          </template>
        </el-list-item>
      </el-list>

      <el-pagination
        v-model:current-page="currentPage"
        v-model:page-size="pageSize"
        :total="total"
        @current-change="handlePageChange"
      />
    </el-card>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue';
import { notificationApi } from '@/api/notification';
import type { Notification } from '@/types/notification';
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus';

const activeTab = ref('all');
const notifications = ref<Notification[]>([]);
const unreadCount = ref(0);
const currentPage = ref(1);
const pageSize = ref(10);
const total = ref(0);

const loadNotifications = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await notificationApi.getNotifications(
      currentPage.value - 1,
      pageSize.value
    );
    notifications.value = response.content || [];
    total.value = response.totalElements || 0;

    // 加载未读数量
    unreadCount.value = await notificationApi.getUnreadCount();
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to load notifications:', error);
  }
};

const handleRead = (notification: Notification) => {
  if (notification.status === 'UNREAD') {
    handleMarkRead(notification.id);
  }

  if (notification.actionUrl) {
    // TODO: 跳转到关联页面
    console.log('Navigate to:', notification.actionUrl);
  }
};

const handleMarkRead = async (notificationId: string) => {
  try {
    await notificationApi.markAsRead(notificationId);
    loadNotifications();
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to mark as read:', error);
  }
};

const handleMarkAllRead = async () => {
  try {
    await notificationApi.markAllAsRead();
    ElMessage.success('全部标记为已读');
    loadNotifications();
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to mark all as read:', error);
  }
};

const handleDelete = async (notificationId: string) => {
  try {
    await ElMessageBox.confirm('确认删除该通知？', '删除确认');
    await notificationApi.deleteNotification(notificationId);
    ElMessage.success('删除成功');
    loadNotifications();
  } catch (error: any) {
    if (error !== 'cancel') {
      ElMessage.error('删除失败：' + (error.response?.data?.message || ''));
    }
  }
};

const handlePageChange = (page: number) => {
  currentPage.value = page;
  loadNotifications();
};

const getTypeType = (type: string) => {
  const types: Record<string, any> = {
    SYSTEM: 'info',
    BILL: 'warning',
    ALARM: 'danger',
    DEVICE: 'success'
  };
  return types[type] || 'info';
};

const getTypeText = (type: string) => {
  const texts: Record<string, string> = {
    SYSTEM: '系统',
    BILL: '账单',
    ALARM: '告警',
    DEVICE: '设备'
  };
  return texts[type] || type;
};

const formatTime = (time: string) => {
  return new Date(time).toLocaleString('zh-CN');
};

onMounted(() => {
  loadNotifications();
});
</script>
